```bash
    <text x="70" y="222" font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="#1d4ed8">Interpretation: A=6 hard input</text>
    <text x="70" y="244" font-size="12" fill="#475569">--&gt; To satisfy Rule5, B &lt;= 3</text>
    <rect x="50" y="264" width="320" height="44" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="70" y="282" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">Still solvable: A=6, B=2, C=2</text>
    <text x="70" y="300" font-size="11" fill="#16a34a">Check: 6+2=8 [ok]  6+2+2=10 [ok]</text>
    <rect x="130" y="334" width="160" height="36" rx="18" fill="#22c55e"/>
    <text x="210" y="357" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="white">SOLVABLE</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Arrow 2-3 -->
  <line x1="800" y1="210" x2="850" y2="210" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#arrRed)"/>
  <text x="825" y="195" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="600">Rule tightens</text>
  <text x="825" y="228" font-size="10" fill="#64748b" text-anchor="middle">Rule4 to &lt;=8</text>

  <!-- ===== STAGE 3 ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(810,70)">
    <rect x="30" y="0" width="360" height="36" rx="18" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="210" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">Stage 3: Rule4 --&gt; No Solution</text>
    <rect x="30" y="50" width="360" height="310" rx="12" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow2)"/>
    <rect x="50" y="60" width="320" height="30" rx="6" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#fca5a5" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="70" y="80" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">Rule4:  A + B + C &lt;= 8  (from &lt;=12)</text>
    <text x="50" y="112" font-size="12" fill="#475569">A=6,  Rule1:  B &gt;= 2</text>
    <text x="50" y="132" font-size="12" fill="#475569">Rule2:  C &lt;= 3</text>
    <text x="50" y="152" font-size="12" fill="#7c3aed">Rule3:  C &gt;= 2  (A=6 triggers)</text>
    <text x="50" y="172" font-size="12" fill="#dc2626">Rule4:  B + C &lt;= 2</text>
    <rect x="50" y="186" width="320" height="70" rx="8" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#fca5a5" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="70" y="208" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">Conflict:</text>
    <text x="70" y="228" font-size="12" fill="#7f1d1d">B &gt;= 2  AND  C &gt;= 2  --&gt;  B + C &gt;= 4</text>
    <text x="70" y="248" font-size="12" fill="#7f1d1d">But Rule4:  B + C &lt;= 2</text>
    <text x="210" y="268" font-size="13" fill="#dc2626" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">4 &gt; 2  [X] Impossible!</text>
    <text x="210" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="#64748b">"Why no solution?"</text>
    <rect x="130" y="374" width="160" height="36" rx="18" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="210" y="397" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">NO SOLUTION</text>
  </g>

  <rect x="200" y="625" width="800" height="60" rx="12" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow2)"/>
  <text x="600" y="652" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="white" font-weight="600">Core: Which rule conflicts with which? Manual排查 is very difficult</text>
  <text x="600" y="674" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">-- This is the conflict diagnosis problem the config engine must solve</text>
</svg>
'@
```

<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 720" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif">
  <title>3.3 Relaxation Variable: Adding a Switch to Each Rule</title>
  <desc>Relaxation mechanism: attach a binary switch ri to each rule, allowing the solver to bypass rules when needed</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg3" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8fafc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow3" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="130%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="3" stdDeviation="6" flood-color="#64748b" flood-opacity="0.15"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="glowGreen" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="4" result="blur"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="720" fill="url(#bg3)"/>

  <text x="600" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" letter-spacing="1">3.3 Relaxation Variable: Adding a Switch to Each Rule</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="1050" y2="58" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- Intro explanation -->
  <rect x="80" y="70" width="1040" height="50" rx="10" fill="#eff6ff" stroke="#bfdbfe" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow3)"/>
  <text x="600" y="92" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#1e40af" font-weight="600">Key Idea: Add a binary switch r_i to each rule. When r_i=1, the rule is temporarily "bypassed".</text>
  <text x="600" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">Solver goal: minimize the number of activated switches (minimize sum of r_i)</text>

  <!-- Left: Original vs Relaxed comparison -->
  <text x="100" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">Original</text>
  <text x="320" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">Relaxed</text>
  <text x="520" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">Switch</text>
  <line x1="90" y1="155" x2="270" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="300" y1="155" x2="490" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="510" y1="155" x2="630" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>

  <text x="880" y="172" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8" text-anchor="middle">When r=1, constraint becomes virtually inactive</text>

  <!-- Rule cards -->
  <!-- Row 1 -->

    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  </g>

    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">C &lt;= 3 + M*r2</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="11" fill="#475569">r2=0: original  &lt;=3</text>
    <text x="18" y="58" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">r2=1: &lt;= 103 (inactive)</text>

  <!-- Rule 3 -->

    <rect x="0" y="0" width="6" height="70" rx="3" fill="#8b5cf6"/>

    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="14" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B + C &lt;= 8</text>

  <g transform="translate(305,405)" filter="url(#shadow3)">

    <rect x="0" y="0" width="6" height="70" rx="3" fill="#f59e0b"/>

    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Implication + relaxation</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="11" fill="#475569">Implemented via</text>
    <text x="18" y="58" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">auxiliary variables + r5</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(530,485)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="100" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>

    <text x="230" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">User Input</text>

    <text x="230" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#92400e">(hard constraint, fixed)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Objective function -->
  <rect x="80" y="570" width="1040" height="60" rx="12" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow3)"/>
  <text x="600" y="598" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" fill="white" font-weight="700">Objective Function</text>
  <text x="600" y="620" text-anchor="middle" font-size="18" fill="#fbbf24" font-weight="700">minimize  ( r1 + r2 + r3 + r4 + r5 )</text>

  <!-- Legend -->

  <g transform="translate(120,658)">
    <circle cx="8" cy="8" r="8" fill="#94a3b8"/>
    <text x="24" y="13" font-size="12" fill="#475569">r=0: Rule active (tight)</text>
    <circle cx="220" cy="8" r="8" fill="#22c55e"/>
    <text x="236" y="13" font-size="12" fill="#475569">r=1: Rule bypassed (relaxed)</text>
    <circle cx="440" cy="8" r="8" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="456" y="13" font-size="12" fill="#475569">r=1 in conflict zone</text>
  </g>
  <text x="750" y="666" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">Minimize activated switches --&gt; fewest rules bypassed --&gt; most faithful to original constraints</text>
</svg>

```bash
$content = @'
<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 720" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif">
  <title>3.3 Relaxation Variable: Adding a Switch to Each Rule</title>
  <desc>Relaxation mechanism: attach a binary switch ri to each rule, allowing the solver to bypass rules when needed</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg3" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8fafc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow3" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="130%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="3" stdDeviation="6" flood-color="#64748b" flood-opacity="0.15"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="glowGreen" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="4" result="blur"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="720" fill="url(#bg3)"/>

  <text x="600" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" letter-spacing="1">3.3 Relaxation Variable: Adding a Switch to Each Rule</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="1050" y2="58" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- Intro explanation -->
  <rect x="80" y="70" width="1040" height="50" rx="10" fill="#eff6ff" stroke="#bfdbfe" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow3)"/>
  <text x="600" y="92" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#1e40af" font-weight="600">Key Idea: Add a binary switch r_i to each rule. When r_i=1, the rule is temporarily "bypassed".</text>
  <text x="600" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">Solver goal: minimize the number of activated switches (minimize sum of r_i)</text>

  <!-- Left: Original vs Relaxed comparison -->
  <text x="100" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">Original</text>
  <text x="320" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">Relaxed</text>
  <text x="520" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">Switch</text>
  <line x1="90" y1="155" x2="270" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="300" y1="155" x2="490" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="510" y1="155" x2="630" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>

  <!-- Big M explanation box -->
  <rect x="650" y="130" width="460" height="50" rx="10" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow3)"/>
  <text x="880" y="155" font-size="14" fill="white" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">M = 100 (Big-M: a large constant)</text>
  <text x="880" y="172" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8" text-anchor="middle">When r=1, constraint becomes virtually inactive</text>

  <!-- Rule cards -->
  <!-- Row 1 -->
  <!-- Rule 1 -->
  <g transform="translate(80,165)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="6" height="70" rx="3" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#3b82f6">Rule 1</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="14" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B &gt;= 8</text>
    <text x="18" y="60" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">Lower bound</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(305,165)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B &gt;= 8 - M*r1</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="11" fill="#475569">r1=0: original  &gt;=8</text>
    <text x="18" y="58" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">r1=1: &gt;= -92 (inactive)</text>
  </g>
  <!-- Switch r1 OFF -->
  <g transform="translate(530,165)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="100" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="50" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">r1</text>
    <rect x="25" y="28" width="50" height="24" rx="12" fill="#e2e8f0"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="40" r="9" fill="#94a3b8"/>
    <text x="50" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748b">OFF = 0</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rule 2 -->
  <g transform="translate(80,245)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="6" height="70" rx="3" fill="#10b981"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#10b981">Rule 2</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="14" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">C &lt;= 3</text>
    <text x="18" y="60" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">Upper bound</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(305,245)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">C &lt;= 3 + M*r2</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="11" fill="#475569">r2=0: original  &lt;=3</text>
    <text x="18" y="58" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">r2=1: &lt;= 103 (inactive)</text>
  </g>
  <!-- Switch r2 ON (highlighted) -->
  <g transform="translate(530,245)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="100" height="70" rx="10" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="50" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">r2</text>
    <rect x="25" y="28" width="50" height="24" rx="12" fill="#22c55e"/>
    <circle cx="70" cy="40" r="9" fill="white"/>
    <text x="50" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#16a34a" font-weight="700">ON = 1</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rule 3 -->
  <g transform="translate(80,325)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="6" height="70" rx="3" fill="#8b5cf6"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#8b5cf6">Rule 3</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="14" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A &gt; 4 --&gt; C &gt;= 2</text>
    <text x="18" y="60" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">Conditional</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(305,325)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#8b5cf6" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Implication + relaxation</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="11" fill="#475569">Implemented via</text>
    <text x="18" y="58" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">auxiliary variables + r3</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(530,325)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="100" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="50" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">r3</text>
    <rect x="25" y="28" width="50" height="24" rx="12" fill="#e2e8f0"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="40" r="9" fill="#94a3b8"/>
    <text x="50" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748b">OFF = 0</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rule 4 - THE KEY ONE (highlighted) -->
  <g transform="translate(80,405)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="6" height="70" rx="3" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#ef4444">Rule 4</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="14" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B + C &lt;= 8</text>
    <text x="18" y="60" font-size="11" fill="#fca5a5">Total cap</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(305,405)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B + C &lt;= 8 + M*r4</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="11" fill="#dc2626">r4=0: &lt;= 8 (tight!)</text>
    <text x="18" y="58" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">r4=1: &lt;= 108 (inactive)</text>
  </g>
  <!-- Switch r4 ON -->
  <g transform="translate(530,405)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="100" height="70" rx="10" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="50" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">r4</text>
    <rect x="25" y="28" width="50" height="24" rx="12" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <circle cx="70" cy="40" r="9" fill="white"/>
    <text x="50" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#dc2626" font-weight="700">ON = 1</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rule 5 -->
  <g transform="translate(80,485)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="6" height="70" rx="3" fill="#f59e0b"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#f59e0b">Rule 5</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="14" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">B &gt; 3 --&gt; A &lt;= 4</text>
    <text x="18" y="60" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">Conditional</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(305,485)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#f59e0b" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Implication + relaxation</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="11" fill="#475569">Implemented via</text>
    <text x="18" y="58" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">auxiliary variables + r5</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(530,485)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="100" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="50" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">r5</text>
    <rect x="25" y="28" width="50" height="24" rx="12" fill="#e2e8f0"/>
    <circle cx="30" cy="40" r="9" fill="#94a3b8"/>
    <text x="50" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748b">OFF = 0</text>
  </g>

  <!-- User input -->
  <g transform="translate(650,405)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="460" height="70" rx="10" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#fcd34d" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#shadow3)"/>
    <text x="230" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">User Input</text>
    <text x="230" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" fill="#78350f" font-weight="700">A = 6</text>
    <text x="230" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#92400e">(hard constraint, fixed)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Objective function -->
  <rect x="80" y="570" width="1040" height="60" rx="12" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow3)"/>
  <text x="600" y="598" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" fill="white" font-weight="700">Objective Function</text>
  <text x="600" y="620" text-anchor="middle" font-size="18" fill="#fbbf24" font-weight="700">minimize  ( r1 + r2 + r3 + r4 + r5 )</text>

  <!-- Legend -->
  <rect x="80" y="645" width="1040" height="55" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <g transform="translate(120,658)">
    <circle cx="8" cy="8" r="8" fill="#94a3b8"/>
    <text x="24" y="13" font-size="12" fill="#475569">r=0: Rule active (tight)</text>
    <circle cx="220" cy="8" r="8" fill="#22c55e"/>
    <text x="236" y="13" font-size="12" fill="#475569">r=1: Rule bypassed (relaxed)</text>
    <circle cx="440" cy="8" r="8" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="456" y="13" font-size="12" fill="#475569">r=1 in conflict zone</text>
  </g>
  <text x="750" y="666" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">Minimize activated switches --&gt; fewest rules bypassed --&gt; most faithful to original constraints</text>
</svg>
```

  <!-- ===== CONSTRAINTS COLUMN ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(440,110)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="360" height="460" rx="14" fill="#1e293b" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow4)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="360" height="44" rx="14" fill="#334155"/>

    <text x="20" y="70" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">All constraints with A=6 substituted:</text>

    <text x="20" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#60a5fa">C1:  6 + B &gt;= 8 - 100*r1</text>
    <text x="20" y="118" font-size="11" fill="#475569">--&gt; B &gt;= 2 - 100*r1</text>

    <text x="20" y="150" font-size="12" fill="#60a5fa">C2:  C &lt;= 3 + 100*r2</text>

    <text x="20" y="200" font-size="12" fill="#fca5a5">C3:  6 + B + C &lt;= 8 + 100*r4</text>
    <text x="20" y="218" font-size="11" fill="#fca5a5">--&gt; B + C &lt;= 2 + 100*r4  </text>
    <rect x="240" y="185" width="100" height="28" rx="6" fill="#450a0a" stroke="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="290" y="204" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444" font-weight="700">with r4=1</text>

    <text x="20" y="265" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">C4:  (B &gt; 3 --&gt; 6 &lt;= 4) + relaxation</text>
    <text x="20" y="283" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">--&gt; B &lt;= 3 when A=6</text>

    <text x="20" y="325" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">C5:  (6 &gt; 4 --&gt; C &gt;= 2) + relaxation</text>

    <line x1="0" y1="360" x2="360" y2="360" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
    <text x="20" y="380" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">Step 1: Try r_i = 0 for all i</text>
    <text x="20" y="396" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444">--&gt; B+C &lt;= 2  but  B &gt;= 2, C &gt;= 2</text>
    <text x="20" y="412" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444">--&gt; B+C &gt;= 4  --&gt; INFEASIBLE!</text>
    <text x="20" y="432" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">Step 2: Set r4=1, others=0</text>
    <text x="20" y="448" font-size="11" fill="#22c55e">--&gt; B+C &lt;= 102  --&gt; SATISFIED!</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== OBJECTIVE ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(820,110)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="200" rx="14" fill="#1e293b" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow4)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="44" rx="14" fill="#334155"/>
    <rect x="0" y="14" width="320" height="30" fill="#334155"/>
    <text x="160" y="28" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#fbbf24">Objective Function</text>

    <text x="160" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="white" font-weight="700">minimize</text>
    <text x="160" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" fill="#fbbf24" font-weight="700">( r1 + r2 + r3 + r4 + r5 )</text>
    <text x="160" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#94a3b8">With weights:</text>
    <text x="160" y="168" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="#f1f5f9">minimize  (1*r1 + 1*r2 + 1*r3 + 1*r4 + 1*r5)</text>
    <text x="160" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">All weights = 1 (equal priority)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== SOLUTION ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(820,325)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="245" rx="14" fill="#052e16" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#shadow4)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="40" rx="14" fill="#14532d"/>
    <rect x="0" y="14" width="320" height="26" fill="#14532d"/>
    <text x="160" y="30" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#86efac">Solution Found</text>

    <text x="20" y="70" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">Partial solution:</text>
    <text x="20" y="98" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#fbbf24">A = 6</text>
    <text x="120" y="98" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#fbbf24">B = 2</text>
    <text x="220" y="98" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#fbbf24">C = 2</text>

    <line x1="20" y1="112" x2="300" y2="112" stroke="#14532d" stroke-width="1"/>

    <text x="20" y="135" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">Verification:</text>
    <text x="20" y="158" font-size="12" fill="#22c55e">Rule1:  6+2 = 8 &gt;= 8  [ok]</text>
    <text x="20" y="178" font-size="12" fill="#22c55e">Rule2:  2 &lt;= 3  [ok]</text>
    <text x="20" y="198" font-size="12" fill="#22c55e">Rule3:  A&gt;4 --&gt; C&gt;=2  [ok]</text>
    <text x="20" y="218" font-size="12" fill="#ef4444">Rule4:  6+2+2 = 10 &gt; 8  [violated]</text>
    <text x="20" y="238" font-size="12" fill="#22c55e">Rule5:  B&lt;=3  [ok]</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Footer -->
  <text x="600" y="665" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#475569">Solver minimizes sum(r_i) --&gt; finds solution with only r4=1, partial feasible config A=6, B=2, C=2</text>
</svg>
'@

```bash
    <rect x="20" y="420" width="320" height="28" rx="6" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#334155"/>
    <text x="180" y="438" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">sum = r1+r2+r3+r4+r5 = 0+0+0+1+0 = </text>
    <text x="320" y="438" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#fbbf24">1</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== CONSTRAINTS COLUMN ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(440,110)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="360" height="460" rx="14" fill="#1e293b" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow4)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="360" height="44" rx="14" fill="#334155"/>
    <rect x="0" y="14" width="360" height="30" fill="#334155"/>
    <text x="180" y="28" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#f1f5f9">Constraints</text>

    <text x="20" y="70" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">All constraints with A=6 substituted:</text>

    <text x="20" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#60a5fa">C1:  6 + B &gt;= 8 - 100*r1</text>
    <text x="20" y="118" font-size="11" fill="#475569">--&gt; B &gt;= 2 - 100*r1</text>

    <text x="20" y="150" font-size="12" fill="#60a5fa">C2:  C &lt;= 3 + 100*r2</text>

    <text x="20" y="200" font-size="12" fill="#fca5a5">C3:  6 + B + C &lt;= 8 + 100*r4</text>
    <text x="20" y="218" font-size="11" fill="#fca5a5">--&gt; B + C &lt;= 2 + 100*r4  </text>
    <rect x="240" y="185" width="100" height="28" rx="6" fill="#450a0a" stroke="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="290" y="204" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444" font-weight="700">with r4=1</text>
    <text x="290" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444">B+C &lt;= 102</text>

    <text x="20" y="265" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">C4:  (B &gt; 3 --&gt; 6 &lt;= 4) + relaxation</text>
    <text x="20" y="283" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">--&gt; B &lt;= 3 when A=6</text>

    <text x="20" y="325" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">C5:  (6 &gt; 4 --&gt; C &gt;= 2) + relaxation</text>
    <text x="20" y="343" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">--&gt; C &gt;= 2 (triggered by A=6)</text>

    <!-- Solving process -->
    <line x1="0" y1="360" x2="360" y2="360" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
    <text x="20" y="380" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">Step 1: Try r_i = 0 for all i</text>
    <text x="20" y="396" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444">--&gt; B+C &lt;= 2  but  B &gt;= 2, C &gt;= 2</text>
    <text x="20" y="412" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444">--&gt; B+C &gt;= 4  --&gt; INFEASIBLE!</text>
    <text x="20" y="432" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">Step 2: Set r4=1, others=0</text>
    <text x="20" y="448" font-size="11" fill="#22c55e">--&gt; B+C &lt;= 102  --&gt; SATISFIED!</text>

    <text x="160" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="white" font-weight="700">minimize</text>
    <text x="160" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" fill="#fbbf24" font-weight="700">( r1 + r2 + r3 + r4 + r5 )</text>
    <text x="160" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#94a3b8">With weights:</text>
    <text x="160" y="168" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="#f1f5f9">minimize  (1*r1 + 1*r2 + 1*r3 + 1*r4 + 1*r5)</text>
    <text x="160" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">All weights = 1 (equal priority)</text>
  </g>

    <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="245" rx="14" fill="#052e16" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#shadow4)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="40" rx="14" fill="#14532d"/>

    <text x="20" y="98" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#fbbf24">A = 6</text>

    <text x="20" y="158" font-size="12" fill="#22c55e">Rule1:  6+2 = 8 &gt;= 8  [ok]</text>

</svg>
```

<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: $content = @'
<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 680" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif">
  <title>3.5 Conflict Diagnosis Report</title>
  <desc>Relaxation result, partial solution, and diagnosis report - the core value of relaxation variables</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg5" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8fafc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow5" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="130%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="4" stdDeviation="8" flood-color="#64748b" flood-opacity="0.15"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="680" fill="url(#bg5)"/>

  <text x="600" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" letter-spacing="1">3.5 Conflict Diagnosis: Reading the Relaxation Result</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="1050" y2="58" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="600" y="78" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#64748b">From "no solution" --&gt; "which rules conflict + partial feasible solution" --&gt; actionable user decision</text>

  <!-- ===== SECTION 1: Relaxation Result ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(50,100)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="340" height="340" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow5)"/>
    <!-- Header -->
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="340" height="50" rx="14" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <rect x="0" y="20" width="340" height="30" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <text x="170" y="32" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="white">Relaxation Result</text>

    <!-- r1 -->
    <g transform="translate(20,65)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#15803d">r1 = 0</text>
      <text x="100" y="24" font-size="13" fill="#475569">Rule1: A+B &gt;= 8</text>
      <circle cx="275" cy="18" r="10" fill="#22c55e"/>
      <text x="275" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="white">&#10003;</text>
    </g>
    <!-- r2 -->
    <g transform="translate(20,111)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#15803d">r2 = 0</text>
      <text x="100" y="24" font-size="13" fill="#475569">Rule2: C &lt;= 3</text>
      <circle cx="275" cy="18" r="10" fill="#22c55e"/>
      <text x="275" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="white">&#10003;</text>
    </g>
    <!-- r3 -->
    <g transform="translate(20,157)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#15803d">r3 = 0</text>
      <text x="100" y="24" font-size="13" fill="#475569">Rule3: A&gt;4 --&gt; C&gt;=2</text>
      <circle cx="275" cy="18" r="10" fill="#22c55e"/>
      <text x="275" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="white">&#10003;</text>
    </g>
    <!-- r4 = 1 (KEY) -->
    <g transform="translate(20,203)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="50" rx="8" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">r4 = 1</text>
      <text x="100" y="24" font-size="13" fill="#475569">Rule4: A+B+C &lt;= 8</text>
      <text x="15" y="42" font-size="11" fill="#fca5a5">BYPASSED -- constraint relaxed</text>
      <circle cx="275" cy="18" r="10" fill="#ef4444"/>
      <text x="275" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="white">&#10007;</text>
      <!-- Arrow pointing to conflict -->
      <path d="M275,28 L275,40" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrRed)"/>
    </g>
    <!-- r5 -->
    <g transform="translate(20,263)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#15803d">r5 = 0</text>
      <text x="100" y="24" font-size="13" fill="#475569">Rule5: B&gt;3 --&gt; A&lt;=4</text>
      <circle cx="275" cy="18" r="10" fill="#22c55e"/>
      <text x="275" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="white">&#10003;</text>
    </g>

    <!-- Summary -->
    <rect x="20" y="315" width="300" height="20" rx="4" fill="#fef3c7"/>
    <text x="170" y="328" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#92400e" font-weight="700">Sum = 1 (only r4 relaxed)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Arrow between sections -->
  <line x1="410" y1="270" x2="450" y2="270" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrBlue5)"/>
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrBlue5" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="7" refY="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,10 L10,5 z" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- ===== SECTION 2: Partial Solution ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(470,100)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="340" height="340" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow5)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="340" height="50" rx="14" fill="#059669"/>
    <rect x="0" y="20" width="340" height="30" fill="#059669"/>
    <text x="170" y="32" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="white">Partial Solution</text>

    <!-- Glasses with solution values -->
    <g transform="translate(50,70)">
      <!-- A -->
      <g>
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="70" height="100" rx="10" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#fcd34d" stroke-width="2"/>
        <text x="35" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">A</text>

        <rect x="19" y="35" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>

        <rect x="39" y="35" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="19" y="45" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="29" y="45" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="39" y="45" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="24" y="55" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fbbf24"/>
        <rect x="24" y="65" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fcd34d"/>
        <text x="35" y="92" text-anchor="middle" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#78350f">= 6</text>
        <text x="35" y="108" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#b45309">user input</text>
      </g>
      <!-- B -->
      <g transform="translate(85,0)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="70" height="100" rx="10" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <text x="35" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#15803d">B</text>
        <rect x="15" y="28" width="40" height="55" rx="6" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <rect x="24" y="35" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="24" y="45" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fbbf24"/>
        <rect x="24" y="55" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fcd34d"/>
        <rect x="24" y="65" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fde68a"/>
        <rect x="24" y="75" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fef3c7"/>
        <text x="35" y="92" text-anchor="middle" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#15803d">= 2</text>
        <text x="35" y="108" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#16a34a">from Rule1</text>
      </g>
      <!-- C -->
      <g transform="translate(170,0)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="70" height="100" rx="10" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <text x="35" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#15803d">C</text>
        <rect x="15" y="28" width="40" height="55" rx="6" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <rect x="24" y="35" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="24" y="45" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fbbf24"/>
        <rect x="24" y="55" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fcd34d"/>
        <rect x="24" y="65" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fde68a"/>
        <rect x="24" y="75" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fef3c7"/>
        <text x="35" y="92" text-anchor="middle" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#15803d">= 2</text>
        <text x="35" y="108" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#16a34a">from Rule3</text>
      </g>
    </g>

    <!-- Total -->
    <rect x="20" y="200" width="300" height="44" rx="8" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#fcd34d" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="170" y="222" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">Total = 6 + 2 + 2 = 10</text>
    <text x="170" y="238" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#b45309">Exceeds Rule4 cap of 8 --&gt; Rule4 relaxed</text>

    <!-- Rule checks -->
    <g transform="translate(20,260)">
      <text x="0" y="14" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">Rule1:  8 &gt;= 8  &#10003;</text>
      <text x="150" y="14" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">Rule2:  2 &lt;= 3  &#10003;</text>
      <text x="0" y="32" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">Rule3:  C&gt;=2    &#10003;</text>
      <text x="150" y="32" font-size="12" fill="#dc2626">Rule4:  10 &gt; 8  &#10007;</text>
      <text x="0" y="50" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">Rule5:  B&lt;=3    &#10003;</text>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- Arrow -->
  <line x1="830" y1="270" x2="870" y2="270" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- ===== SECTION 3: Diagnosis Report ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(890,100)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="260" height="340" rx="14" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#shadow5)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="260" height="50" rx="14" fill="#dc2626"/>
    <rect x="0" y="20" width="260" height="30" fill="#dc2626"/>
    <text x="130" y="32" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="white">Diagnosis Report</text>

    <text x="20" y="75" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">Conflicting Rule:</text>
    <rect x="20" y="85" width="220" height="50" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="35" y="105" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">Rule 4: A+B+C &lt;= 8</text>
    <text x="35" y="125" font-size="11" fill="#7f1d1d">Incompatible with user input A=6</text>

    <text x="20" y="158" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">Relaxation Applied:</text>
    <rect x="20" y="168" width="220" height="36" rx="8" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#fcd34d" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="35" y="187" font-size="13" fill="#92400e">Cap raised: 8 --&gt; 10</text>
    <text x="35" y="200" font-size="11" fill="#b45309">Rule4 still enforced but with looser bound</text>

    <text x="20" y="230" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">Partial Solution:</text>
    <rect x="20" y="240" width="220" height="60" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="35" y="258" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">A = 6 (user input)</text>
    <text x="35" y="274" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">B = 2 (from Rule1)</text>
    <text x="35" y="290" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">C = 2 (from Rule3)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== BOTTOM: User Decision ===== -->
  <rect x="50" y="460" width="1100" height="90" rx="14" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow5)"/>
  <text x="600" y="490" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">User Decision: What to do next?</text>

  <!-- Option A -->
  <g transform="translate(130,505)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="36" rx="10" fill="#14532d" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="200" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="#86efac">Option A: Accept relaxed config</text>
    <text x="200" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">"I understand Rule4 is relaxed. Use this config."</text>
  </g>
  <!-- Option B -->
  <g transform="translate(570,505)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="36" rx="10" fill="#450a0a" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="200" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="#fca5a5">Option B: Adjust input to satisfy Rule4</text>
    <text x="200" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">"Set A to 4 or 5 to strictly satisfy Rule4"</text>
  </g>

  <text x="600" y="580" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Core Value of Relaxation: Binary problem (solvable/unsolvable) --&gt; valuable decision support for users</text>
  <text x="600" y="600" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">"Which rules are bypassed + partial feasible solution" gives users actionable information</text>

  <text x="600" y="665" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">Partial solution (A=6, B=2, C=2) keeps user intent intact while acknowledging the trade-off</text>
</svg>
'@

```bash
$content = @'
<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 680" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif">
  <title>3.5 Conflict Diagnosis Report</title>
  <desc>Relaxation result, partial solution, and diagnosis report - the core value of relaxation variables</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg5" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8fafc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow5" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="130%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="4" stdDeviation="8" flood-color="#64748b" flood-opacity="0.15"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="680" fill="url(#bg5)"/>

  <text x="600" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" letter-spacing="1">3.5 Conflict Diagnosis: Reading the Relaxation Result</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="1050" y2="58" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="600" y="78" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#64748b">From "no solution" --&gt; "which rules conflict + partial feasible solution" --&gt; actionable user decision</text>

  <!-- ===== SECTION 1: Relaxation Result ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(50,100)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="340" height="340" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow5)"/>
    <!-- Header -->
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="340" height="50" rx="14" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <rect x="0" y="20" width="340" height="30" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <text x="170" y="32" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="white">Relaxation Result</text>

    <!-- r1 -->
    <g transform="translate(20,65)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#15803d">r1 = 0</text>
      <text x="100" y="24" font-size="13" fill="#475569">Rule1: A+B &gt;= 8</text>
      <circle cx="275" cy="18" r="10" fill="#22c55e"/>
      <text x="275" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="white">&#10003;</text>
    </g>
    <!-- r2 -->
    <g transform="translate(20,111)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#15803d">r2 = 0</text>
      <text x="100" y="24" font-size="13" fill="#475569">Rule2: C &lt;= 3</text>
      <circle cx="275" cy="18" r="10" fill="#22c55e"/>
      <text x="275" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="white">&#10003;</text>
    </g>
    <!-- r3 -->
    <g transform="translate(20,157)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#15803d">r3 = 0</text>
      <text x="100" y="24" font-size="13" fill="#475569">Rule3: A&gt;4 --&gt; C&gt;=2</text>
      <circle cx="275" cy="18" r="10" fill="#22c55e"/>
      <text x="275" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="white">&#10003;</text>
    </g>
    <!-- r4 = 1 (KEY) -->
    <g transform="translate(20,203)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="50" rx="8" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">r4 = 1</text>
      <text x="100" y="24" font-size="13" fill="#475569">Rule4: A+B+C &lt;= 8</text>
      <text x="15" y="42" font-size="11" fill="#fca5a5">BYPASSED -- constraint relaxed</text>
      <circle cx="275" cy="18" r="10" fill="#ef4444"/>
      <text x="275" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="white">&#10007;</text>
      <!-- Arrow pointing to conflict -->
      <path d="M275,28 L275,40" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrRed)"/>
    </g>
    <!-- r5 -->
    <g transform="translate(20,263)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="300" height="36" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#15803d">r5 = 0</text>
      <text x="100" y="24" font-size="13" fill="#475569">Rule5: B&gt;3 --&gt; A&lt;=4</text>
      <circle cx="275" cy="18" r="10" fill="#22c55e"/>
      <text x="275" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="white">&#10003;</text>
    </g>

    <!-- Summary -->
    <rect x="20" y="315" width="300" height="20" rx="4" fill="#fef3c7"/>
    <text x="170" y="328" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#92400e" font-weight="700">Sum = 1 (only r4 relaxed)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Arrow between sections -->
  <line x1="410" y1="270" x2="450" y2="270" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrBlue5)"/>
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrBlue5" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="7" refY="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,10 L10,5 z" fill="#3b82f6"/>

    <rect x="0" y="20" width="340" height="30" fill="#059669"/>
    <text x="170" y="32" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="white">Partial Solution</text>

    <!-- Glasses with solution values -->
    <g transform="translate(50,70)">

      <g>
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="70" height="100" rx="10" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#fcd34d" stroke-width="2"/>

        <rect x="29" y="35" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="39" y="35" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="19" y="45" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="29" y="45" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="39" y="45" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="24" y="55" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fbbf24"/>
        <rect x="24" y="65" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fcd34d"/>
        <text x="35" y="92" text-anchor="middle" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#78350f">= 6</text>
        <text x="35" y="108" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#b45309">user input</text>
      </g>
      <!-- B -->
      <g transform="translate(85,0)">
        <rect x="0" y="0" width="70" height="100" rx="10" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <text x="35" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#15803d">B</text>

        <rect x="24" y="35" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="24" y="45" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fbbf24"/>
        <rect x="24" y="55" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fcd34d"/>

        <rect x="24" y="75" width="8" height="8" rx="1" fill="#fef3c7"/>
        <text x="35" y="92" text-anchor="middle" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#15803d">= 2</text>
        <text x="35" y="108" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#16a34a">from Rule1</text>

  <text x="600" y="490" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">User Decision: What to do next?</text>

    <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="36" rx="10" fill="#450a0a" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="200" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="#fca5a5">Option B: Adjust input to satisfy Rule4</text>
    <text x="200" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">"Set A to 4 or 5 to strictly satisfy Rule4"</text>
  </g>

  <text x="600" y="580" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Core Value of Relaxation: Binary problem (solvable/unsolvable) --&gt; valuable decision support for users</text>
  <text x="600" y="600" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">"Which rules are bypassed + partial feasible solution" gives users actionable information</text>

  <text x="600" y="665" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">Partial solution (A=6, B=2, C=2) keeps user intent intact while acknowledging the trade-off</text>
</svg>
'@
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: $content = @'
<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 640" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif">
  <title>3.6 Six-Step Summary</title>
  <desc>Complete workflow: Model, Solve, Add relax vars, Re-solve, Diagnose, Present</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg6" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8fafc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow6" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="130%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="4" stdDeviation="8" flood-color="#64748b" flood-opacity="0.15"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="glow6" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blur"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
    <marker id="arrGreen" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="7" refY="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,10 L10,5 z" fill="#22c55e"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrBlue6" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="7" refY="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,10 L10,5 z" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="640" fill="url(#bg6)"/>

  <text x="600" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" letter-spacing="1">3.6 Six-Step Workflow: From Conflict to Clarity</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="1050" y2="58" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- ===== STEP 1: Model ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(30,80)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="170" height="230" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="170" height="46" rx="14" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <rect x="0" y="22" width="170" height="24" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <!-- Step number -->
    <circle cx="25" cy="28" r="14" fill="white"/>
    <text x="25" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#3b82f6">1</text>
    <text x="95" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">Model</text>

    <!-- Icon: pencil/ruler -->
    <g transform="translate(55,56)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="60" height="40" rx="6" fill="#eff6ff"/>
      <text x="30" y="18" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="#3b82f6">A+B</text>
      <text x="30" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">&gt;=8</text>
    </g>

    <text x="85" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Business Rules</text>
    <text x="85" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">--&gt;</text>
    <text x="85" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Math Constraints</text>

    <rect x="20" y="165" width="130" height="50" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0"/>
    <text x="85" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#15803d">A+B &gt;= 8</text>
    <text x="85" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#15803d">C &lt;= 3</text>
    <text x="85" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#15803d">A+B+C &lt;= 8</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Arrow 1-2 -->
  <line x1="210" y1="195" x2="240" y2="195" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#arrGreen)"/>

  <!-- ===== STEP 2: Solve ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(250,80)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="170" height="230" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="170" height="46" rx="14" fill="#8b5cf6"/>
    <rect x="0" y="22" width="170" height="24" fill="#8b5cf6"/>
    <circle cx="25" cy="28" r="14" fill="white"/>
    <text x="25" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#8b5cf6">2</text>
    <text x="95" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">Solve</text>

    <!-- Magnifying glass / X icon -->
    <g transform="translate(45,55)">
      <circle cx="30" cy="25" r="22" fill="none" stroke="#8b5cf6" stroke-width="3"/>
      <line x1="46" y1="41" x2="60" y2="55" stroke="#8b5cf6" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <line x1="20" y1="15" x2="40" y2="35" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </g>

    <text x="85" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">CP-SAT Solver</text>
    <text x="85" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">Search for valid</text>
    <text x="85" y="156" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">variable assignment</text>

    <!-- NO SOLUTION badge -->
    <rect x="20" y="170" width="130" height="36" rx="8" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="85" y="194" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">NO SOLUTION</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Arrow 2-3 -->
  <line x1="430" y1="195" x2="460" y2="195" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#arrGreen)"/>

  <!-- ===== STEP 3: Add Relax Vars ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(470,80)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="170" height="230" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="170" height="46" rx="14" fill="#f59e0b"/>
    <rect x="0" y="22" width="170" height="24" fill="#f59e0b"/>
    <circle cx="25" cy="28" r="14" fill="white"/>
    <text x="25" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#f59e0b">3</text>
    <text x="95" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">Add Relax Vars</text>

    <!-- Switch icon -->
    <g transform="translate(40,55)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="90" height="50" rx="8" fill="#fef3c7"/>
      <text x="45" y="18" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#92400e">A+B+C&lt;=8</text>
      <rect x="8" y="26" width="35" height="16" rx="8" fill="#f59e0b"/>
      <circle cx="37" cy="34" r="6" fill="white"/>
      <text x="65" y="38" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#f59e0b">r4</text>
    </g>

    <text x="85" y="120" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Attach switch</text>
    <text x="85" y="140" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">to each rule:</text>

    <text x="85" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#475569">A+B+C &lt;= 8+M*r4</text>
    <text x="85" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#475569">A+B &gt;= 8-M*r1</text>
    <text x="85" y="205" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#475569">... + relaxation</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Arrow 3-4 -->
  <line x1="650" y1="195" x2="680" y2="195" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#arrGreen)"/>

  <!-- ===== STEP 4: Re-solve ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(690,80)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="170" height="230" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="170" height="46" rx="14" fill="#10b981"/>
    <rect x="0" y="22" width="170" height="24" fill="#10b981"/>
    <circle cx="25" cy="28" r="14" fill="white"/>
    <text x="25" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#10b981">4</text>
    <text x="95" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">Re-solve</text>

    <!-- Minimization target -->
    <g transform="translate(25,55)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="120" height="55" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#22c55e"/>
      <text x="60" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#15803d" font-weight="600">minimize</text>
      <text x="60" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#15803d" font-weight="700">sum(r_i)</text>
      <text x="60" y="52" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#16a34a">fewest bypasses</text>
    </g>

    <text x="85" y="125" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Solver finds:</text>

    <!-- Checkmark result -->
    <rect x="20" y="140" width="130" height="36" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="85" y="164" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#16a34a">SOLVED! sum=1</text>

    <text x="85" y="195" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#475569">Partial solution:</text>
    <text x="85" y="212" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#475569">A=6, B=2, C=2</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Arrow 4-5 -->
  <line x1="870" y1="195" x2="900" y2="195" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#arrGreen)"/>

  <!-- ===== STEP 5: Diagnose ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(910,80)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="130" height="230" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="130" height="46" rx="14" fill="#ec4899"/>
    <rect x="0" y="22" width="130" height="24" fill="#ec4899"/>
    <circle cx="20" cy="28" r="14" fill="white"/>
    <text x="20" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#ec4899">5</text>
    <text x="72" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="white">Diagnose</text>

    <!-- Magnifier on r4 -->
    <g transform="translate(20,55)">
      <circle cx="30" cy="20" r="20" fill="none" stroke="#ec4899" stroke-width="3"/>
      <line x1="45" y1="35" x2="60" y2="50" stroke="#ec4899" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <text x="30" y="25" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">r4=1</text>
    </g>

    <text x="65" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Read r_i = 1</text>
    <text x="65" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">Which rules</text>
    <text x="65" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">were bypassed?</text>

    <rect x="15" y="160" width="100" height="55" rx="8" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="65" y="182" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">Rule 4</text>
    <text x="65" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#7f1d1d">A+B+C &lt;= 8</text>
    <text x="65" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#fca5a5">incompatible</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== STEP 6: Present ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(1050,80)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="130" height="230" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="130" height="46" rx="14" fill="#1e3a5f"/>
    <rect x="0" y="22" width="130" height="24" fill="#1e3a5f"/>
    <circle cx="20" cy="28" r="14" fill="white"/>
    <text x="20" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#1e3a5f">6</text>
    <text x="72" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="white">Present</text>

    <!-- Report icon -->
    <g transform="translate(20,55)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="90" height="60" rx="6" fill="#eff6ff" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <line x1="10" y1="18" x2="80" y2="18" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2"/>
      <line x1="10" y1="30" x2="70" y2="30" stroke="#93c5fd" stroke-width="2"/>
      <line x1="10" y1="42" x2="75" y2="42" stroke="#93c5fd" stroke-width="2"/>
      <line x1="10" y1="54" x2="50" y2="54" stroke="#93c5fd" stroke-width="2"/>
    </g>

    <text x="65" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">Conflict report</text>
    <text x="65" y="148" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">+ partial solution</text>

    <rect x="10" y="158" width="110" height="60" rx="8" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#fcd34d"/>
    <text x="65" y="178" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">Rule4 relaxed</text>
    <text x="65" y="196" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#b45309">A=6, B=2, C=2</text>
    <text x="65" y="212" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#92400e">cap: 8 --&gt; 10</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== BOTTOM SUMMARY BAR ===== -->
  <rect x="50" y="330" width="1100" height="80" rx="14" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
  <text x="600" y="358" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="white">Complete Workflow</text>
  <text x="600" y="382" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="#fbbf24" font-weight="600">Business Rules --&gt; Math Model --&gt; No Solution --&gt; Add Switches --&gt; Minimize sum(r_i) --&gt; Actionable Diagnosis</text>
  <text x="600" y="402" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">Transforms a binary "solvable/unsolvable" question into "which rules conflict + partial feasible solution"</text>

  <!-- ===== KEY INSIGHT ===== -->
  <rect x="50" y="430" width="530" height="180" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
  <rect x="50" y="430" width="530" height="40" rx="14" fill="#3b82f6"/>
  <rect x="50" y="454" width="530" height="16" fill="#3b82f6"/>
  <text x="315" y="456" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">Why Relaxation Variables Work</text>

  <text x="80" y="495" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Before (traditional):</text>
  <rect x="80" y="505" width="470" height="36" rx="8" fill="#fef2f2"/>
  <text x="100" y="526" font-size="12" fill="#dc2626">"No solution" --&gt; User confused, manual debugging required</text>

  <text x="80" y="562" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">After (relaxation variables):</text>
  <rect x="80" y="572" width="470" height="36" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4"/>
  <text x="100" y="593" font-size="12" fill="#16a34a">"Rule4 relaxed, partial solution A=6,B=2,C=2" --&gt; User can decide</text>

  <!-- ===== FORMULA TABLE ===== -->
  <rect x="600" y="430" width="550" height="180" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
  <rect x="600" y="430" width="550" height="40" rx="14" fill="#059669"/>
  <rect x="600" y="454" width="550" height="16" fill="#059669"/>
  <text x="875" y="456" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">Key Formulas</text>

  <g font-size="12" fill="#334155">
    <text x="625" y="490" font-weight="700" fill="#3b82f6">Step 1 (Model):</text>
    <text x="625" y="508">Business rules --&gt; A+B+C &lt;= 8, A+B &gt;= 8, ...</text>

    <text x="625" y="530" font-weight="700" fill="#8b5cf6">Step 3 (Relax):</text>
    <text x="625" y="548">Add r_i: A+B+C &lt;= 8 + M*r4</text>

    <text x="625" y="570" font-weight="700" fill="#f59e0b">Step 4 (Objective):</text>
    <text x="625" y="588">minimize sum(w_i * r_i)</text>

    <text x="625" y="610" font-weight="700" fill="#10b981">Step 5 (Diagnose):</text>
    <text x="625" y="628">Read r_i = 1 --&gt; conflicting rules</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Footer -->
  <text x="600" y="625" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">minimize sum(r_i) finds the minimal set of rules to relax, preserving maximum business logic fidelity</text>
</svg>
'@
[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText('d:\03.code4cursor\jmixconfigengine\persum\assets\chapter3\03-06-six-step-summary.svg', $content, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)

```bash
$content = @'
<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 640" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="'Segoe UI', 'PingFang SC', 'Microsoft YaHei', sans-serif">
  <title>3.6 Six-Step Summary</title>
  <desc>Complete workflow: Model, Solve, Add relax vars, Re-solve, Diagnose, Present</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg6" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8fafc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow6" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="130%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="4" stdDeviation="8" flood-color="#64748b" flood-opacity="0.15"/>
    </filter>
    <filter id="glow6" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feGaussianBlur stdDeviation="3" result="blur"/><feMerge><feMergeNode in="blur"/><feMergeNode in="SourceGraphic"/></feMerge>
    </filter>
    <marker id="arrGreen" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="7" refY="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,10 L10,5 z" fill="#22c55e"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrBlue6" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="7" refY="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,10 L10,5 z" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="640" fill="url(#bg6)"/>

  <text x="600" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" letter-spacing="1">3.6 Six-Step Workflow: From Conflict to Clarity</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="1050" y2="58" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- ===== STEP 1: Model ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(30,80)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="170" height="230" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="170" height="46" rx="14" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <rect x="0" y="22" width="170" height="24" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <!-- Step number -->
    <circle cx="25" cy="28" r="14" fill="white"/>
    <text x="25" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#3b82f6">1</text>
    <text x="95" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">Model</text>

    <!-- Icon: pencil/ruler -->
    <g transform="translate(55,56)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="60" height="40" rx="6" fill="#eff6ff"/>
      <text x="30" y="18" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="#3b82f6">A+B</text>
      <text x="30" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">&gt;=8</text>
    </g>

    <text x="85" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Business Rules</text>
    <text x="85" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">--&gt;</text>
    <text x="85" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Math Constraints</text>

    <rect x="20" y="165" width="130" height="50" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0"/>
    <text x="85" y="185" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#15803d">A+B &gt;= 8</text>
    <text x="85" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#15803d">C &lt;= 3</text>
    <text x="85" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#15803d">A+B+C &lt;= 8</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Arrow 1-2 -->
  <line x1="210" y1="195" x2="240" y2="195" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#arrGreen)"/>

  <!-- ===== STEP 2: Solve ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(250,80)">
```

| 文件 | 对应章节 | 内容 |

| `03-04-solver-perspective.svg` | 3.4 | 深色蓝图纸风格，展示求解器看到的变量/约束/目标函数 |
| `03-05-conflict-diagnosis.svg` | 3.5 | 三栏诊断报告：松弛结果 + 部分解 + 冲突诊断 + 用户决策 |
| `03-06-six-step-summary.svg` | 3.6 | 六步流程全景图 + 关键公式 + Why it works 解释 |

所有 SVG 都使用扁平化专业插图风格，配色为蓝/绿/琥珀/红色系，适合嵌入技术文档。SVG 文件可在浏览器或任何支持 SVG 的编辑器中打开查看，也可以直接嵌入 Markdown 或 HTML 中。

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-8-thinking-high)**_

<think>
I can see the issue clearly now. Looking at the hex dump:

- `EF BF BD` is the UTF-8 BOM/encoding for replacement characters, which means the original Chinese characters were encoded as CESU-8 or some other non-standard encoding
- There are also control characters like `0x1F`, `0x14`, `0x09`, `0x0F`, `0x0C` embedded in the text

The original SVG content I wrote via the Write tool had Chinese characters. The Write tool seems to have converted them to some malformed encoding. Specifically:
- The Chinese text in title/desc elements has been corrupted


- Control characters got embedded in the content itself

I need to either strip out the title and desc elements entirely, replace the corrupted Chinese with ASCII, or re-encode the file properly. Since I originally created 03-01 with the Write tool and wrote the rest via PowerShell using UTF-8 encoding, the corruption must be coming from the Write tool's encoding behavior for SVG files.

Looking at the actual byte data, I can see `EF BF BD` which is the UTF-8 replacement character that appears when the original text wasn't valid UTF-8 before encoding. The Chinese characters from the original Chinese content got mangled through some encoding pipeline, and the title field ended up as `3.1 �H/�_  o??` with those replacement characters. This strongly suggests the Write tool is interpreting or re-encoding the Chinese text through a non-UTF-8 charset, corrupting it in the process.

I think the Write tool is actually saving the file with Windows-1252 or GB2312 encoding instead of UTF-8, which would explain why the Chinese characters are unreadable when viewed as UTF-8. The hex pattern confirms this — the `EF BF BD` bytes are what happens when Windows-1252 characters get misinterpreted as UTF-8.

Since I can't fix this through the Write tool directly, I'll need to replace the title and description elements with ASCII-only content instead, or strip them out entirely. For the Chinese text that needs to stay, I'll need to find a workaround.

Looking at the byte sequence more carefully, I can see there are control characters like the unit separator (0x1F), tab (0x09), and form feed (0x0C) mixed in with the Chinese characters. The `EF BF BD` sequences are UTF-8 replacement characters that appear when the original encoding doesn't match. Rather than trying to fix the encoding, the cleanest solution is to replace the title and description elements with ASCII text, since SVG parsers won't care about those metadata fields anyway.
</think>

问题确认：Write 工具保存 SVG 时对中文进行了错误的编码（被写成了乱码+控制字符），导致 XML 解析失败。需要用 PowerShell 重新写入所有 SVG，所有中文 metadata 改为 ASCII，SVG 内容中的中文文本用 XML 实体转义。

    <rect x="36" y="74" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#fbbf24" transform="rotate(-2,43,81)"/>

    <text x="40" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#1e40af">B = 4</text>
    <text x="40" y="178" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">[0, 5]</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Glass C -->
  <g transform="translate(760,110)">
    <path d="M10,20 L10,110 Q10,130 40,130 Q70,130 70,110 L70,20 Z" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7"/>
    <path d="M10,20 Q5,20 5,25 L5,105 Q5,110 10,110" fill="#93c5fd" opacity="0.5"/>
    <rect x="20" y="90" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#f59e0b" transform="rotate(-3,27,97)"/>
    <rect x="36" y="90" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#f59e0b" transform="rotate(2,43,97)"/>
    <text x="40" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#1e40af">C = 2</text>
    <text x="40" y="178" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">[0, 5]</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Verification ticks -->
  <g font-size="11" fill="#16a34a" font-weight="600">
    <text x="320" y="200">Rule1: 4+4=8 &gt;= 8</text>
    <text x="560" y="200">Rule4: 10 &lt;= 12</text>
    <text x="800" y="200">Rule2: 2 &lt;= 3</text>
  </g>

  <text x="600" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#64748b">Five Business Rules</text>

  <!-- Rule 1 -->
  <g filter="url(#cardShadow)">
    <rect x="40" y="240" width="210" height="68" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="40" y="240" width="6" height="68" rx="3" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <text x="60" y="264" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#3b82f6">Rule 1</text>
    <text x="60" y="284" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B &gt;= 8</text>
    <text x="60" y="300" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">A + B at least 8</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rule 2 -->
  <g filter="url(#cardShadow)">
    <rect x="265" y="240" width="210" height="68" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="265" y="240" width="6" height="68" rx="3" fill="#10b981"/>
    <text x="285" y="264" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#10b981">Rule 2</text>
    <text x="285" y="284" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">C &lt;= 3</text>
    <text x="285" y="300" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">C no more than 3</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rule 3 -->
  <g filter="url(#cardShadow)">
    <rect x="490" y="240" width="210" height="68" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="490" y="240" width="6" height="68" rx="3" fill="#8b5cf6"/>
    <text x="510" y="264" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#8b5cf6">Rule 3</text>
    <text x="510" y="284" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A &gt; 4 --&gt; C &gt;= 2</text>
    <text x="510" y="300" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">If A &gt; 4 then C &gt;= 2</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rule 4 -->
  <g filter="url(#cardShadow)">
    <rect x="715" y="240" width="210" height="68" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="715" y="240" width="6" height="68" rx="3" fill="#f59e0b"/>
    <text x="735" y="264" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#f59e0b">Rule 4</text>
    <text x="735" y="284" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B + C &lt;= 12</text>
    <text x="735" y="300" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">Total cap 12</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rule 5 -->
  <g filter="url(#cardShadow)">
    <rect x="940" y="240" width="210" height="68" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="940" y="240" width="6" height="68" rx="3" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="960" y="264" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#ef4444">Rule 5</text>
    <text x="960" y="284" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">B &gt; 3 --&gt; A &lt;= 4</text>
    <text x="960" y="300" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">If B &gt; 3 then A &lt;= 4</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rules 6 & 7 -->
  <g filter="url(#cardShadow)">
    <rect x="40" y="325" width="210" height="68" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="40" y="325" width="6" height="68" rx="3" fill="#6366f1"/>
    <text x="60" y="349" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#6366f1">Rule 6</text>
    <text x="60" y="369" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B &gt;= 10</text>
    <text x="60" y="385" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">Becomes A+B &gt;=10</text>
  </g>

  <g filter="url(#cardShadow)">
    <rect x="265" y="325" width="210" height="68" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="265" y="325" width="6" height="68" rx="3" fill="#dc2626"/>
    <text x="285" y="349" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">Rule 7</text>
    <text x="285" y="369" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B &lt;= 9</text>
    <text x="285" y="385" font-size="11" fill="#fca5a5">CONFLICT with Rule 6!</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Conflict explanation -->
  <g transform="translate(490,325)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="660" height="68" rx="10" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#fca5a5" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="20" y="24" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">Conflict Detection</text>
    <text x="20" y="46" font-size="13" fill="#7f1d1d">Rule6: A+B &gt;= 10  vs  Rule7: A+B &lt;= 9</text>
    <text x="20" y="64" font-size="12" fill="#991b1b">Simultaneously impossible --&gt; NO SOLUTION (UNSAT)</text>
  </g>

  <rect x="200" y="415" width="800" height="50" rx="25" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#cardShadow)"/>
  <text x="600" y="447" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" fill="white" font-weight="600">
    Solver question: Is there an (A, B, C) assignment satisfying ALL rules?
  </text>

  <text x="600" y="490" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#64748b">Solver searches all (A,B,C) combinations to find one satisfying all rules</text>

  <!-- Search space -->
  <g transform="translate(300,500)">
    <g fill="#cbd5e1" opacity="0.5">
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="3"/><circle cx="30" cy="0" r="3"/><circle cx="60" cy="0" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="90" cy="0" r="3"/><circle cx="120" cy="0" r="3"/><circle cx="150" cy="0" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="30" r="3"/><circle cx="30" cy="30" r="3"/><circle cx="60" cy="30" r="3"/>

      <circle cx="0" cy="120" r="3"/><circle cx="30" cy="120" r="3"/><circle cx="60" cy="120" r="3"/>

      <circle cx="90" cy="150" r="3"/><circle cx="120" cy="150" r="3"/><circle cx="150" cy="150" r="3"/>
    </g>
    <circle cx="90" cy="60" r="8" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.8" filter="url(#glow)"/>
    <text x="100" y="55" font-size="11" fill="#16a34a" font-weight="700">Solution (A=4, B=4, C=2)</text>
    <line x1="98" y1="60" x2="130" y2="60" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
    <rect x="90" y="0" width="60" height="150" rx="0" fill="#ef4444" opacity="0.08"/>
    <text x="120" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#ef4444">Rule7 conflict zone</text>
    <text x="60" y="185" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">Each dot = one (A,B,C) assignment</text>
  </g>

  <g transform="translate(530,620)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="36" rx="18" fill="#22c55e"/>
    <text x="70" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">SOLVABLE</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(760,620)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="36" rx="18" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="70" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">NO SOLUTION</text>
  </g>

  <text x="600" y="675" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">CSP = Constraint Satisfaction Problem: search finite space for assignments satisfying all constraints</text>
</svg>
'@, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)

  <text x="600" y="674" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">This is the conflict diagnosis problem the config engine must solve</text>
</svg>
'@, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
