<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 700" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="Segoe UI, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif">
  <title>3.2 Conflict Escalation: From 5 Rules to No Solution</title>
  <desc>Three stages: normal solve, user input A=6, rule4 tightens to no solution</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg2" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8fafc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow2" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="130%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="3" stdDeviation="8" flood-color="#64748b" flood-opacity="0.15"/>
    </filter>
    <marker id="arrBlue" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="7" refY="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,10 L10,5 z" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrRed" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="7" refY="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,10 L10,5 z" fill="#ef4444"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="700" fill="url(#bg2)"/>
  <text x="600" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" letter-spacing="1">3.2 Conflict Escalation: From 5 Rules to No Solution</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="1050" y2="58" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <g transform="translate(0,70)">
    <rect x="30" y="0" width="360" height="36" rx="18" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <text x="210" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">Stage 1: Normal Solve</text>
    <rect x="30" y="50" width="360" height="220" rx="12" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow2)"/>
    <text x="50" y="76" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">5 Rules (no user input)</text>
    <text x="50" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#475569">Rule1:  A + B &gt;= 8</text>
    <text x="50" y="120" font-size="12" fill="#475569">Rule2:  C &lt;= 3</text>
    <text x="50" y="140" font-size="12" fill="#475569">Rule3:  A &gt; 4 --&gt; C &gt;= 2</text>
    <text x="50" y="160" font-size="12" fill="#475569">Rule4:  A + B + C &lt;= 12</text>
    <text x="50" y="180" font-size="12" fill="#475569">Rule5:  B &gt; 3 --&gt; A &lt;= 4</text>
    <rect x="50" y="198" width="320" height="58" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="70" y="222" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#16a34a">Solver found:</text>
    <text x="70" y="242" font-size="13" fill="#15803d" font-weight="600">A=4,  B=4,  C=2</text>
    <rect x="130" y="282" width="160" height="36" rx="18" fill="#22c55e"/>
    <text x="210" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">SATISFIED</text>
    <g transform="translate(90,340)">
      <g><text x="20" y="0" font-size="11" fill="#1e40af" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">A</text>
        <rect x="8" y="6" width="24" height="36" rx="4" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <rect x="11" y="12" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/><rect x="19" y="12" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="14" y="20" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#fbbf24"/>
        <rect x="11" y="28" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#fcd34d"/><rect x="19" y="28" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#fcd34d"/>
        <text x="20" y="56" font-size="10" fill="#334155" text-anchor="middle">4</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(60,0)"><text x="20" y="0" font-size="11" fill="#1e40af" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">B</text>
        <rect x="8" y="6" width="24" height="36" rx="4" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <rect x="11" y="12" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/><rect x="19" y="12" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="14" y="20" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#fbbf24"/>
        <rect x="11" y="28" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#fcd34d"/><rect x="19" y="28" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#fcd34d"/>
        <text x="20" y="56" font-size="10" fill="#334155" text-anchor="middle">4</text>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(120,0)"><text x="20" y="0" font-size="11" fill="#1e40af" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">C</text>
        <rect x="8" y="6" width="24" height="36" rx="4" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.5"/>
        <rect x="14" y="12" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/><rect x="11" y="20" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#fbbf24"/>
        <text x="20" y="56" font-size="10" fill="#334155" text-anchor="middle">2</text>
      </g>
    </g>
  </g>

  <line x1="400" y1="210" x2="450" y2="210" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#arrBlue)"/>
  <text x="425" y="195" font-size="11" fill="#3b82f6" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="600">User: A=6</text>

  <g transform="translate(420,70)">
    <rect x="30" y="0" width="360" height="36" rx="18" fill="#f59e0b"/>
    <text x="210" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">Stage 2: User input A=6</text>
    <rect x="30" y="50" width="360" height="270" rx="12" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow2)"/>
    <rect x="50" y="60" width="320" height="32" rx="6" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#fcd34d" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="70" y="80" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">User: A = 6</text>
    <text x="50" y="108" font-size="12" fill="#475569">Rule1:  A+B &gt;= 8 --&gt; B &gt;= 2</text>
    <text x="50" y="128" font-size="12" fill="#475569">Rule2:  C &lt;= 3</text>
    <text x="50" y="148" font-size="12" fill="#7c3aed">Rule3:  A&gt;4 --&gt; C &gt;= 2  (triggered!)</text>
    <text x="50" y="168" font-size="12" fill="#475569">Rule4:  A+B+C &lt;= 12 --&gt; B+C &lt;= 6</text>
    <text x="50" y="188" font-size="12" fill="#ef4444">Rule5:  B&gt;3 --&gt; A&lt;=4  [X] conflict!</text>
    <rect x="50" y="204" width="320" height="52" rx="8" fill="#eff6ff" stroke="#bfdbfe" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="70" y="222" font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="#1d4ed8">Interpretation: A=6 is hard input</text>
    <text x="70" y="244" font-size="12" fill="#475569">--&gt; To satisfy Rule5, B &lt;= 3</text>
    <rect x="50" y="264" width="320" height="44" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="70" y="282" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">Still solvable: A=6, B=2, C=2</text>
    <text x="70" y="300" font-size="11" fill="#16a34a">Check: 6+2=8 [ok]  6+2+2=10 [ok]</text>
    <rect x="130" y="334" width="160" height="36" rx="18" fill="#22c55e"/>
    <text x="210" y="357" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="white">SOLVABLE</text>
  </g>

  <line x1="800" y1="210" x2="850" y2="210" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#arrRed)"/>
  <text x="825" y="195" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="600">Rule tightens</text>
  <text x="825" y="228" font-size="10" fill="#64748b" text-anchor="middle">Rule4 to &lt;=8</text>

  <g transform="translate(810,70)">
    <rect x="30" y="0" width="360" height="36" rx="18" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="210" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">Stage 3: Rule4 --&gt; No Solution</text>
    <rect x="30" y="50" width="360" height="310" rx="12" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow2)"/>
    <rect x="50" y="60" width="320" height="30" rx="6" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#fca5a5" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="70" y="80" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">Rule4:  A + B + C &lt;= 8  (from &lt;=12)</text>
    <text x="50" y="112" font-size="12" fill="#475569">A=6,  Rule1:  B &gt;= 2</text>
    <text x="50" y="132" font-size="12" fill="#475569">Rule2:  C &lt;= 3</text>
    <text x="50" y="152" font-size="12" fill="#7c3aed">Rule3:  C &gt;= 2  (A=6 triggers)</text>
    <text x="50" y="172" font-size="12" fill="#dc2626">Rule4:  B + C &lt;= 2</text>
    <rect x="50" y="186" width="320" height="70" rx="8" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#fca5a5" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="70" y="208" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">Conflict:</text>
    <text x="70" y="228" font-size="12" fill="#7f1d1d">B &gt;= 2  AND  C &gt;= 2  --&gt;  B + C &gt;= 4</text>
    <text x="70" y="248" font-size="12" fill="#7f1d1d">But Rule4:  B + C &lt;= 2</text>
    <text x="210" y="268" font-size="13" fill="#dc2626" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">4 &gt; 2  [X] Impossible!</text>
    <text x="210" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="#64748b">"Why no solution?"</text>
    <rect x="130" y="374" width="160" height="36" rx="18" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="210" y="397" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">NO SOLUTION</text>
  </g>

  <rect x="200" y="625" width="800" height="60" rx="12" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow2)"/>
  <text x="600" y="652" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="white" font-weight="600">Core: Which rule conflicts with which? Manual investigation is very difficult</text>
  <text x="600" y="674" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">This is the conflict diagnosis problem the config engine must solve</text>
</svg>
'@, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)

<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 720" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="Segoe UI, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif">
  <title>3.3 Relaxation Variable: Adding a Switch to Each Rule</title>
  <desc>Attach binary switch ri to each rule; when ri=1, rule is temporarily bypassed; solver minimizes sum(ri)</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg3" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8fafc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow3" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="130%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="3" stdDeviation="6" flood-color="#64748b" flood-opacity="0.15"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="720" fill="url(#bg3)"/>

  <text x="600" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" letter-spacing="1">3.3 Relaxation Variable: Adding a Switch to Each Rule</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="1050" y2="58" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <rect x="80" y="70" width="1040" height="50" rx="10" fill="#eff6ff" stroke="#bfdbfe" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow3)"/>
  <text x="600" y="92" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#1e40af" font-weight="600">Key Idea: Add a binary switch ri to each rule. When ri=1, the rule is temporarily bypassed.</text>
  <text x="600" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">Solver goal: minimize the number of activated switches (minimize sum of ri)</text>

  <text x="100" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">Original</text>
  <text x="320" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">Relaxed</text>
  <text x="530" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">Switch</text>
  <line x1="90" y1="155" x2="270" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="300" y1="155" x2="500" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="520" y1="155" x2="640" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>

  <rect x="660" y="130" width="460" height="50" rx="10" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow3)"/>
  <text x="890" y="155" font-size="14" fill="white" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">M = 100 (Big-M: a large constant)</text>
  <text x="890" y="172" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8" text-anchor="middle">When r=1, constraint becomes virtually inactive</text>

  <g transform="translate(80,165)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="6" height="70" rx="3" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#3b82f6">Rule 1</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="14" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B &gt;= 8</text>
    <text x="18" y="60" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">Lower bound</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(305,165)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B &gt;= 8 - M*r1</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="11" fill="#475569">r1=0: original &gt;=8</text>
    <text x="18" y="58" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">r1=1: &gt;= -92 (inactive)</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(530,165)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="110" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>

<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 720" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="Segoe UI, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif">
  <title>3.3 Relaxation Variable: Adding a Switch to Each Rule</title>
  <desc>Attach binary switch ri to each rule; when ri=1, rule is temporarily bypassed; solver minimizes sum(ri)</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg3" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8fafc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>

  <text x="600" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" letter-spacing="1">3.3 Relaxation Variable: Adding a Switch to Each Rule</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="1050" y2="58" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <text x="600" y="92" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#1e40af" font-weight="600">Key Idea: Add a binary switch ri to each rule. When ri=1, the rule is temporarily bypassed.</text>
  <text x="600" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">Solver goal: minimize the number of activated switches (minimize sum of ri)</text>

  <text x="100" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">Original</text>
  <text x="320" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">Relaxed</text>

  <line x1="90" y1="155" x2="270" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>

  <line x1="520" y1="155" x2="640" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>

    <rect x="0" y="20" width="260" height="30" fill="#dc2626"/>
    <text x="130" y="32" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="white">Diagnosis Report</text>

    <text x="20" y="75" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">Conflicting Rule:</text>
    <rect x="20" y="85" width="220" height="50" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="35" y="105" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">Rule 4: A+B+C &lt;= 8</text>
    <text x="35" y="125" font-size="11" fill="#7f1d1d">Incompatible with user input A=6</text>

    <text x="20" y="158" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">Relaxation Applied:</text>
    <rect x="20" y="168" width="220" height="36" rx="8" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#fcd34d" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="35" y="187" font-size="13" fill="#92400e">Cap raised: 8 --&gt; 10</text>
    <text x="35" y="200" font-size="11" fill="#b45309">Rule4 still enforced but with looser bound</text>

    <text x="20" y="230" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">Partial Solution:</text>
    <rect x="20" y="240" width="220" height="60" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="35" y="258" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">A = 6 (user input)</text>
    <text x="35" y="274" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">B = 2 (from Rule1)</text>
    <text x="35" y="290" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">C = 2 (from Rule3)</text>
  </g>

  <rect x="50" y="460" width="1100" height="90" rx="14" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow5)"/>
  <text x="600" y="490" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">User Decision: What to do next?</text>

  <g transform="translate(130,505)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="36" rx="10" fill="#14532d" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="200" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="#86efac">Option A: Accept relaxed config</text>
    <text x="200" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">"I understand Rule4 is relaxed. Use this config."</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(570,505)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="36" rx="10" fill="#450a0a" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="200" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="#fca5a5">Option B: Adjust input to satisfy Rule4</text>
    <text x="200" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">"Set A to 4 or 5 to strictly satisfy Rule4"</text>
  </g>

  <text x="600" y="580" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Core Value: Binary problem (solvable/unsolvable) --&gt; valuable decision support for users</text>
  <text x="600" y="600" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">"Which rules are bypassed + partial feasible solution" gives users actionable information</text>
  <text x="600" y="665" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">Partial solution (A=6, B=2, C=2) keeps user intent intact while acknowledging the trade-off</text>
</svg>
'@, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)

<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 680" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="Segoe UI, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif">
  <title>3.5 Conflict Diagnosis Report</title>
  <desc>Relaxation result, partial solution, and diagnosis report - core value of relaxation variables</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg5" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8fafc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>

  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="680" fill="url(#bg5)"/>

  <text x="600" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" letter-spacing="1">3.5 Conflict Diagnosis: Reading the Relaxation Result</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="1050" y2="58" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="600" y="78" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#64748b">From "no solution" --&gt; "which rules conflict + partial feasible solution" --&gt; actionable user decision</text>

  <g transform="translate(50,100)">

    <g transform="translate(20,65)">

    <rect x="0" y="0" width="260" height="340" rx="14" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#shadow5)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="260" height="50" rx="14" fill="#dc2626"/>
    <rect x="0" y="20" width="260" height="30" fill="#dc2626"/>
    <text x="130" y="32" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="white">Diagnosis Report</text>

    <text x="20" y="75" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">Conflicting Rule:</text>
    <rect x="20" y="85" width="220" height="50" rx="8" fill="white" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="35" y="105" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">Rule 4: A+B+C &lt;= 8</text>
    <text x="35" y="125" font-size="11" fill="#7f1d1d">Incompatible with user input A=6</text>

    <text x="20" y="158" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">Relaxation Applied:</text>
    <rect x="20" y="168" width="220" height="36" rx="8" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#fcd34d" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="35" y="187" font-size="13" fill="#92400e">Cap raised: 8 --&gt; 10</text>
    <text x="35" y="200" font-size="11" fill="#b45309">Rule4 still enforced but with looser bound</text>

    <text x="20" y="230" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">Partial Solution:</text>
    <rect x="20" y="240" width="220" height="60" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="35" y="258" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">A = 6 (user input)</text>
    <text x="35" y="274" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">B = 2 (from Rule1)</text>
    <text x="35" y="290" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">C = 2 (from Rule3)</text>
  </g>

  <rect x="50" y="460" width="1100" height="90" rx="14" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow5)"/>
  <text x="600" y="490" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">User Decision: What to do next?</text>

  <g transform="translate(130,505)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="36" rx="10" fill="#14532d" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="200" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="#86efac">Option A: Accept relaxed config</text>
    <text x="200" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">"I understand Rule4 is relaxed. Use this config."</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(570,505)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="36" rx="10" fill="#450a0a" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="200" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="#fca5a5">Option B: Adjust input to satisfy Rule4</text>
    <text x="200" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">"Set A to 4 or 5 to strictly satisfy Rule4"</text>
  </g>

  <text x="600" y="580" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Core Value: Binary problem (solvable/unsolvable) --&gt; valuable decision support for users</text>
  <text x="600" y="600" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">"Which rules are bypassed + partial feasible solution" gives users actionable information</text>
  <text x="600" y="665" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">Partial solution (A=6, B=2, C=2) keeps user intent intact while acknowledging the trade-off</text>
</svg>
'@, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)

    <text x="85" y="212" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#475569">A=6, B=2, C=2</text>
  </g>

    <text x="65" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Read ri = 1</text>
    <text x="65" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">Which rules</text>
    <text x="65" y="150" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">were bypassed?</text>
    <rect x="15" y="160" width="100" height="55" rx="8" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="65" y="182" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">Rule 4</text>
    <text x="65" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#7f1d1d">A+B+C &lt;= 8</text>
    <text x="65" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#fca5a5">incompatible</text>
  </g>

  <g transform="translate(1050,80)">

    <g transform="translate(20,55)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="90" height="60" rx="6" fill="#eff6ff" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <line x1="10" y1="18" x2="80" y2="18" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2"/>

      <line x1="10" y1="42" x2="75" y2="42" stroke="#93c5fd" stroke-width="2"/>
      <line x1="10" y1="54" x2="50" y2="54" stroke="#93c5fd" stroke-width="2"/>
    </g>
    <text x="65" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">Conflict report</text>
    <text x="65" y="148" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">+ partial solution</text>
    <rect x="10" y="158" width="110" height="60" rx="8" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#fcd34d"/>
    <text x="65" y="178" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">Rule4 relaxed</text>
    <text x="65" y="196" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#b45309">A=6, B=2, C=2</text>
    <text x="65" y="212" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#92400e">cap: 8 --&gt; 10</text>
  </g>

  <rect x="50" y="330" width="1100" height="80" rx="14" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
  <text x="600" y="358" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="white">Complete Workflow</text>
  <text x="600" y="382" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="#fbbf24" font-weight="600">Business Rules --&gt; Math Model --&gt; No Solution --&gt; Add Switches --&gt; Minimize sum(ri) --&gt; Actionable Diagnosis</text>
  <text x="600" y="402" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">Transforms a binary "solvable/unsolvable" question into "which rules conflict + partial feasible solution"</text>

  <rect x="50" y="430" width="530" height="180" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
  <rect x="50" y="430" width="530" height="40" rx="14" fill="#3b82f6"/>
  <rect x="50" y="454" width="530" height="16" fill="#3b82f6"/>
  <text x="315" y="456" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">Why Relaxation Variables Work</text>

  <text x="80" y="495" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="700" fill="#3b82f6">Before (traditional):</text>
  <rect x="80" y="505" width="470" height="36" rx="8" fill="#fef2f2"/>
  <text x="100" y="526" font-size="12" fill="#dc2626">"No solution" --&gt; User confused, manual debugging required</text>

  <text x="80" y="562" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="700" fill="#10b981">After (relaxation variables):</text>
  <rect x="80" y="572" width="470" height="36" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4"/>
  <text x="100" y="593" font-size="12" fill="#16a34a">"Rule4 relaxed, partial solution A=6,B=2,C=2" --&gt; User can decide</text>

  <rect x="600" y="430" width="550" height="180" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
  <rect x="600" y="430" width="550" height="40" rx="14" fill="#059669"/>
  <rect x="600" y="454" width="550" height="16" fill="#059669"/>
  <text x="875" y="456" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">Key Formulas</text>

  <g font-size="12" fill="#334155">
    <text x="625" y="490" font-weight="700" fill="#3b82f6">Step 1 (Model):</text>
    <text x="625" y="508">Business rules --&gt; A+B+C &lt;= 8, A+B &gt;= 8, ...</text>
    <text x="625" y="530" font-weight="700" fill="#8b5cf6">Step 3 (Relax):</text>
    <text x="625" y="548">Add ri: A+B+C &lt;= 8 + M*r4</text>
    <text x="625" y="570" font-weight="700" fill="#f59e0b">Step 4 (Objective):</text>
    <text x="625" y="588">minimize sum(wi * ri)</text>
    <text x="625" y="610" font-weight="700" fill="#10b981">Step 5 (Diagnose):</text>
    <text x="625" y="628">Read ri = 1 --&gt; conflicting rules</text>
  </g>

  <text x="600" y="625" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">minimize sum(ri) finds the minimal set of rules to relax, preserving maximum business logic fidelity</text>
</svg>
'@, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)

<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 640" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="Segoe UI, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif">
  <title>3.6 Six-Step Workflow Summary</title>
  <desc>Complete workflow: Model, Solve, Add relax vars, Re-solve, Diagnose, Present</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg6" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8fafc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow6" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="130%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="4" stdDeviation="8" flood-color="#64748b" flood-opacity="0.15"/>
    </filter>
    <marker id="arrGreen" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="7" refY="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,10 L10,5 z" fill="#22c55e"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="640" fill="url(#bg6)"/>

  <text x="600" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" letter-spacing="1">3.6 Six-Step Workflow: From Conflict to Clarity</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="1050" y2="58" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <g transform="translate(30,80)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="170" height="230" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="170" height="46" rx="14" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <rect x="0" y="22" width="170" height="24" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <circle cx="25" cy="28" r="14" fill="white"/>
    <text x="25" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#3b82f6">1</text>
    <text x="95" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">Model</text>
    <g transform="translate(55,56)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="60" height="40" rx="6" fill="#eff6ff"/>
      <text x="30" y="18" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="#3b82f6">A+B</text>
      <text x="30" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">&gt;=8</text>
    </g>
    <text x="85" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Business Rules</text>
    <text x="85" y="135" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">--&gt;</text>
    <text x="85" y="155" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">Math Constraints</text>

  <rect x="600" y="430" width="550" height="180" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>

  <g font-size="12" fill="#334155">
    <text x="625" y="490" font-weight="700" fill="#3b82f6">Step 1 (Model):</text>

    <text x="625" y="530" font-weight="700" fill="#8b5cf6">Step 3 (Relax):</text>

    <text x="625" y="588">minimize sum(wi * ri)</text>
    <text x="625" y="610" font-weight="700" fill="#10b981">Step 5 (Diagnose):</text>
    <text x="625" y="628">Read ri = 1 --&gt; conflicting rules</text>
  </g>

  <text x="600" y="625" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">minimize sum(ri) finds the minimal set of rules to relax, preserving maximum business logic fidelity</text>
</svg>
'@, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)

```bash
Get-ChildItem "d:\03.code4cursor\jmixconfigengine\persum\assets\chapter3\*.svg" | ForEach-Object {
  $content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($_.FullName, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
  $hasInvalid = $false
  for ($i = 0; $i -lt $content.Length; $i++) {
    $c = $content[$i]
    if ([int]$c -lt 32 -and $c -ne "`t" -and $c -ne "`n" -and $c -ne "`r") {
      $hasInvalid = $true
      Write-Output "INVALID CHAR at pos $i in $($_.Name): char=$([int]$c)"
      break
    }
  }
  if (-not $hasInvalid) {
    Write-Output "VALID: $($_.Name)"
  }
}

```bash
$content = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText('d:\03.code4cursor\jmixconfigengine\persum\assets\chapter3\03-06-six-step-summary.svg', [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
$lines = $content -split "`n"
for ($i = 0; $i -lt $lines.Count; $i++) {
  $line = $lines[$i]
  $matches = [regex]::Matches($line, 'fill="([^"]*)"')
  if ($matches.Count -gt 1) {
    Write-Output "Line $($i+1): $($matches.Count) fill attrs"
    Write-Output "  $line"
  }
}
```

```bash
Get-ChildItem "d:\03.code4cursor\jmixconfigengine\persum\assets\chapter3\*.svg" | ForEach-Object {
  try {
    $xml = [xml][System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($_.FullName, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
    Write-Output "XML OK: $($_.Name) ($($xml.SelectNodes('//*').Count) elements)"
  } catch {
    Write-Output "FAIL: $($_.Name) - $($_.Exception.Message.Substring(0,100))"
  }
}

<think>
All 6 SVG files are now valid XML and should render correctly in a browser.
</think>

全部 6 张 SVG 通过 XML 验证，每个文件都已生成正确。可以在浏览器中直接打开查看。

**问题根源**：`Write` 工具写入文件时对 UTF-8 中文字符做了错误编码（被 BOM 破坏），导致 XML 解析器在 `<title>` 和 `<desc>` 标签中遇到非法字符。修复方案：所有 SVG 改用纯 ASCII 文本，用 PowerShell 的 `[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText(..., [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)` 强制以正确编码写入。

---

另外，整个图形的解释最好是中文，注释的地方都改成中文。

The label text for the first arrow is at x=425, y=195 with "User: A=6"

结构清晰了：两个箭头分别连接三阶段，文本标签压在箭头上导致遮挡。修复方案：

2. 箭头与卡片间距加大，避免遮挡
3. 标签文本移到箭头下方
4. 全部文本改为中文

<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 700" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="Segoe UI, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif">
  <title>3.2 从5条规则开始：逐步引入冲突</title>
  <desc>三阶段冲突升级：正常求解 - 用户输入A=6 - 规则4收紧导致无解</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg2" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8fafc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow2" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="130%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="3" stdDeviation="8" flood-color="#64748b" flood-opacity="0.15"/>

  <!-- ===== Stage 1 ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(0,70)">

    <rect x="30" y="50" width="360" height="220" rx="12" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow2)"/>
    <text x="50" y="76" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">5条规则（无用户输入）</text>
    <text x="50" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#475569">规则1：  A + B &gt;= 8</text>
    <text x="50" y="120" font-size="12" fill="#475569">规则2：  C &lt;= 3</text>
    <text x="50" y="140" font-size="12" fill="#475569">规则3：  A &gt; 4 → C &gt;= 2</text>
    <text x="50" y="160" font-size="12" fill="#475569">规则4：  A + B + C &lt;= 12</text>
    <text x="50" y="180" font-size="12" fill="#475569">规则5：  B &gt; 3 → A &lt;= 4</text>
    <rect x="50" y="198" width="320" height="58" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="70" y="222" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#16a34a">求解器找到解：</text>
    <text x="70" y="242" font-size="13" fill="#15803d" font-weight="600">A=4，  B=4，  C=2</text>
    <rect x="130" y="282" width="160" height="36" rx="18" fill="#22c55e"/>
    <text x="210" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">满足条件</text>
    <g transform="translate(90,340)">
      <g>
        <text x="20" y="0" font-size="11" fill="#1e40af" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">A</text>

        <rect x="11" y="12" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>

        <rect x="14" y="20" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#fbbf24"/>

        <rect x="14" y="12" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#f59e0b"/>
        <rect x="11" y="20" width="6" height="6" rx="1" fill="#fbbf24"/>
        <text x="20" y="56" font-size="10" fill="#334155" text-anchor="middle">2</text>
      </g>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== Arrow 1-2 ===== -->
  <!-- Arrow body: shorter, positioned higher to avoid overlapping with Stage2 header -->
  <line x1="395" y1="200" x2="450" y2="200" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrBlue)"/>
  <!-- Label below the arrow -->
  <rect x="383" y="205" width="80" height="22" rx="4" fill="#3b82f6" opacity="0.9"/>
  <text x="423" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="white" font-weight="600">用户输入</text>
  <text x="423" y="234" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#3b82f6" font-weight="600">A = 6</text>

  <!-- ===== Stage 2 ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(420,70)">
    <rect x="30" y="0" width="360" height="36" rx="18" fill="#f59e0b"/>
    <text x="210" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">阶段二：用户输入 A=6</text>
    <rect x="30" y="50" width="360" height="270" rx="12" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow2)"/>
    <rect x="50" y="60" width="320" height="32" rx="6" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#fcd34d" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="70" y="80" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">用户输入：A = 6</text>
    <text x="50" y="108" font-size="12" fill="#475569">规则1：  A+B &gt;= 8 → B &gt;= 2</text>
    <text x="50" y="128" font-size="12" fill="#475569">规则2：  C &lt;= 3</text>
    <text x="50" y="148" font-size="12" fill="#7c3aed">规则3：  A&gt;4 → C &gt;= 2  （触发！）</text>
    <text x="50" y="168" font-size="12" fill="#475569">规则4：  A+B+C &lt;= 12 → B+C &lt;= 6</text>
    <text x="50" y="188" font-size="12" fill="#ef4444">规则5：  B&gt;3 → A&lt;=4  矛盾！</text>
    <rect x="50" y="204" width="320" height="52" rx="8" fill="#eff6ff" stroke="#bfdbfe" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="70" y="222" font-size="12" font-weight="600" fill="#1d4ed8">解读：A=6 为硬性输入</text>
    <text x="70" y="244" font-size="12" fill="#475569">→ 要满足规则5，必须 B &lt;= 3</text>
    <rect x="50" y="264" width="320" height="44" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="70" y="282" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">仍有解：A=6, B=2, C=2</text>
    <text x="70" y="300" font-size="11" fill="#16a34a">验证：6+2=8 ≥8 ✓  6+2+2=10 ≤12 ✓</text>
    <rect x="130" y="334" width="160" height="36" rx="18" fill="#22c55e"/>
    <text x="210" y="357" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="white">有解</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== Arrow 2-3 ===== -->
  <line x1="795" y1="200" x2="850" y2="200" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrRed)"/>
  <rect x="783" y="205" width="80" height="22" rx="4" fill="#ef4444" opacity="0.9"/>
  <text x="823" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="white" font-weight="600">规则收紧</text>
  <text x="823" y="234" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444" font-weight="600">规则4 改为 ≤8</text>

  <!-- ===== Stage 3 ===== -->
  <g transform="translate(810,70)">
    <rect x="30" y="0" width="360" height="36" rx="18" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="210" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">阶段三：规则4收紧 → 无解</text>
    <rect x="30" y="50" width="360" height="310" rx="12" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow2)"/>
    <rect x="50" y="60" width="320" height="30" rx="6" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#fca5a5" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="70" y="80" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">规则4：  A + B + C &lt;= 8  （从 ≤12 收紧）</text>
    <text x="50" y="112" font-size="12" fill="#475569">A=6，  规则1：  B &gt;= 2</text>
    <text x="50" y="132" font-size="12" fill="#475569">规则2：  C &lt;= 3</text>
    <text x="50" y="152" font-size="12" fill="#7c3aed">规则3：  C &gt;= 2  （A=6 触发）</text>
    <text x="50" y="172" font-size="12" fill="#dc2626">规则4：  B + C &lt;= 2</text>
    <rect x="50" y="186" width="320" height="70" rx="8" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#fca5a5" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="70" y="208" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">矛盾推导：</text>
    <text x="70" y="228" font-size="12" fill="#7f1d1d">B &gt;= 2  且  C &gt;= 2  →  B + C &gt;= 4</text>
    <text x="70" y="248" font-size="12" fill="#7f1d1d">但规则4：  B + C &lt;= 2</text>
    <text x="210" y="268" font-size="13" fill="#dc2626" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="700">4 &gt; 2  矛盾！不可能！</text>
    <text x="210" y="290" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="#64748b">"为什么无解？哪里出问题了？"</text>
    <rect x="130" y="374" width="160" height="36" rx="18" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="210" y="397" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">无解</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== Bottom bar ===== -->
  <rect x="200" y="625" width="800" height="60" rx="12" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow2)"/>
  <text x="600" y="652" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="white" font-weight="600">核心问题：哪条规则和哪条规则冲突？人工排查非常困难</text>
  <text x="600" y="674" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">这就是配置引擎需要解决的冲突诊断问题</text>
</svg>

      <circle cx="90" cy="150" r="3"/><circle cx="120" cy="150" r="3"/><circle cx="150" cy="150" r="3"/>
    </g>
    <circle cx="90" cy="60" r="8" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.8" filter="url(#glow)"/>
    <text x="100" y="55" font-size="11" fill="#16a34a" font-weight="700">解 (A=4, B=4, C=2)</text>
    <line x1="98" y1="60" x2="130" y2="60" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
    <rect x="90" y="0" width="60" height="150" rx="0" fill="#ef4444" opacity="0.08"/>
    <text x="120" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#ef4444">规则7冲突区</text>
    <text x="60" y="185" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">每个点 = 一种 (A,B,C) 分配方案</text>
  </g>

  <g transform="translate(530,620)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="36" rx="18" fill="#22c55e"/>
    <text x="70" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">有解</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(760,620)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="36" rx="18" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="70" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">无解</text>
  </g>

  <text x="600" y="675" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">CSP = 约束满足问题：在有限搜索空间中寻找满足所有约束的变量组合</text>
</svg>

<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 680" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="Segoe UI, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif">
  <title>3.1 什么是约束？——从杯子说起</title>
  <desc>桌上三个杯子A、B、C，各放0到5颗糖，受5条业务规则约束</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8fafc"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>

    </filter>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="680" fill="url(#bg)"/>

  <text x="600" y="48" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" letter-spacing="1">3.1 什么是约束？——从杯子说起</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="62" x2="1050" y2="62" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="600" y="92" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#64748b">桌上三个杯子 A、B、C，各放 0 到 5 颗糖，受 5 条业务规则约束</text>

  <!-- Glass A -->

    <path d="M10,20 L10,110 Q10,130 40,130 Q70,130 70,110 L70,20 Z" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7"/>
    <path d="M10,20 Q5,20 5,25 L5,105 Q5,110 10,110" fill="#93c5fd" opacity="0.5"/>
    <rect x="20" y="90" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#f59e0b" transform="rotate(-5,27,97)"/>
    <rect x="36" y="90" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#f59e0b" transform="rotate(3,43,97)"/>
    <rect x="20" y="74" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#fbbf24" transform="rotate(2,27,81)"/>
    <rect x="36" y="74" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#fbbf24" transform="rotate(-3,43,81)"/>
    <rect x="28" y="58" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#fcd34d" transform="rotate(0,35,65)"/>
    <rect x="28" y="42" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#fde68a" transform="rotate(1,35,49)"/>
    <text x="40" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#1e40af">A = 4</text>
    <text x="40" y="178" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">[0, 5]</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Glass B -->
  <g transform="translate(520,110)">
    <path d="M10,20 L10,110 Q10,130 40,130 Q70,130 70,110 L70,20 Z" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7"/>
    <path d="M10,20 Q5,20 5,25 L5,105 Q5,110 10,110" fill="#93c5fd" opacity="0.5"/>
    <rect x="20" y="90" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#f59e0b" transform="rotate(-2,27,97)"/>
    <rect x="36" y="90" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#f59e0b" transform="rotate(4,43,97)"/>
    <rect x="20" y="74" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#fbbf24" transform="rotate(1,27,81)"/>
    <rect x="36" y="74" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#fbbf24" transform="rotate(-2,43,81)"/>
    <rect x="28" y="58" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#fcd34d" transform="rotate(0,35,65)"/>
    <rect x="28" y="42" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#fde68a" transform="rotate(-1,35,49)"/>
    <text x="40" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#1e40af">B = 4</text>
    <text x="40" y="178" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">[0, 5]</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Glass C -->
  <g transform="translate(760,110)">
    <path d="M10,20 L10,110 Q10,130 40,130 Q70,130 70,110 L70,20 Z" fill="#bfdbfe" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7"/>
    <path d="M10,20 Q5,20 5,25 L5,105 Q5,110 10,110" fill="#93c5fd" opacity="0.5"/>
    <rect x="20" y="90" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#f59e0b" transform="rotate(-3,27,97)"/>
    <rect x="36" y="90" width="14" height="14" rx="2" fill="#f59e0b" transform="rotate(2,43,97)"/>
    <text x="40" y="160" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" font-weight="700" fill="#1e40af">C = 2</text>
    <text x="40" y="178" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">[0, 5]</text>
  </g>

  <text x="320" y="200" font-size="11" fill="#16a34a" font-weight="600">规则1：4+4=8 ≥ 8</text>
  <text x="560" y="200" font-size="11" fill="#16a34a" font-weight="600">规则4：10 ≤ 12</text>
  <text x="800" y="200" font-size="11" fill="#16a34a" font-weight="600">规则2：2 ≤ 3</text>

  <text x="600" y="225" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#64748b">五 条 业 务 规 则</text>

  <!-- Rule 1 -->
  <g filter="url(#cardShadow)">
    <rect x="40" y="240" width="210" height="68" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="40" y="240" width="6" height="68" rx="3" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <text x="60" y="264" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#3b82f6">规则 1</text>
    <text x="60" y="284" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B ≥ 8</text>
    <text x="60" y="300" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">A 和 B 的糖加起来至少 8 颗</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rule 2 -->
  <g filter="url(#cardShadow)">
    <rect x="265" y="240" width="210" height="68" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="265" y="240" width="6" height="68" rx="3" fill="#10b981"/>
    <text x="285" y="264" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#10b981">规则 2</text>
    <text x="285" y="284" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">C ≤ 3</text>
    <text x="285" y="300" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">C 的糖不超过 3 颗</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rule 3 -->
  <g filter="url(#cardShadow)">
    <rect x="490" y="240" width="210" height="68" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="490" y="240" width="6" height="68" rx="3" fill="#8b5cf6"/>
    <text x="510" y="264" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#8b5cf6">规则 3</text>
    <text x="510" y="284" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A &gt; 4 → C ≥ 2</text>
    <text x="510" y="300" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">如果 A 超过 4，C 至少 2 颗</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rule 4 -->
  <g filter="url(#cardShadow)">
    <rect x="715" y="240" width="210" height="68" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="715" y="240" width="6" height="68" rx="3" fill="#f59e0b"/>
    <text x="735" y="264" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#f59e0b">规则 4</text>
    <text x="735" y="284" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B + C ≤ 12</text>
    <text x="735" y="300" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">总量不超过 12 颗</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rule 5 -->
  <g filter="url(#cardShadow)">
    <rect x="940" y="240" width="210" height="68" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="940" y="240" width="6" height="68" rx="3" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="960" y="264" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#ef4444">规则 5</text>
    <text x="960" y="284" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">B &gt; 3 → A ≤ 4</text>
    <text x="960" y="300" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">B 超过 3 时，A 不超过 4</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rule 6 -->
  <g filter="url(#cardShadow)">
    <rect x="40" y="325" width="210" height="68" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="40" y="325" width="6" height="68" rx="3" fill="#6366f1"/>
    <text x="60" y="349" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#6366f1">规则 6</text>
    <text x="60" y="369" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B ≥ 10</text>
    <text x="60" y="385" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">叠加后变为 A+B ≥ 10</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Rule 7 -->
  <g filter="url(#cardShadow)">
    <rect x="265" y="325" width="210" height="68" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="265" y="325" width="6" height="68" rx="3" fill="#dc2626"/>
    <text x="285" y="349" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">规则 7</text>
    <text x="285" y="369" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B ≤ 9</text>
    <text x="285" y="385" font-size="11" fill="#fca5a5">与规则6冲突！</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Conflict explanation -->
  <g transform="translate(490,325)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="660" height="68" rx="10" fill="#fef2f2" stroke="#fca5a5" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="20" y="24" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">冲突检测</text>
    <text x="20" y="46" font-size="13" fill="#7f1d1d">规则6：A+B ≥ 10  与  规则7：A+B ≤ 9</text>
    <text x="20" y="64" font-size="12" fill="#991b1b">同时满足不可能 → 无解 (UNSAT)</text>
  </g>

  <rect x="200" y="415" width="800" height="50" rx="25" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#cardShadow)"/>
  <text x="600" y="447" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" fill="white" font-weight="600">
    求解器问题：有没有一种分配方案 (A, B, C) 同时满足所有规则？
  </text>

  <text x="600" y="490" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#64748b">求解器穷举所有 (A,B,C) 组合，找到满足规则的解</text>

  <g transform="translate(300,500)">
    <g fill="#cbd5e1" opacity="0.5">
      <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="3"/><circle cx="30" cy="0" r="3"/><circle cx="60" cy="0" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="90" cy="0" r="3"/><circle cx="120" cy="0" r="3"/><circle cx="150" cy="0" r="3"/>

      <circle cx="0" cy="60" r="3"/><circle cx="30" cy="60" r="3"/><circle cx="60" cy="60" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="90" cy="60" r="3"/><circle cx="120" cy="60" r="3"/><circle cx="150" cy="60" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="90" r="3"/><circle cx="30" cy="90" r="3"/><circle cx="60" cy="90" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="90" cy="90" r="3"/><circle cx="120" cy="90" r="3"/><circle cx="150" cy="90" r="3"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="120" r="3"/><circle cx="30" cy="120" r="3"/><circle cx="60" cy="120" r="3"/>

      <circle cx="90" cy="150" r="3"/><circle cx="120" cy="150" r="3"/><circle cx="150" cy="150" r="3"/>
    </g>
    <circle cx="90" cy="60" r="8" fill="#22c55e" opacity="0.8" filter="url(#glow)"/>
    <text x="100" y="55" font-size="11" fill="#16a34a" font-weight="700">解 (A=4, B=4, C=2)</text>
    <line x1="98" y1="60" x2="130" y2="60" stroke="#22c55e" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="3,2"/>
    <rect x="90" y="0" width="60" height="150" rx="0" fill="#ef4444" opacity="0.08"/>
    <text x="120" y="165" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#ef4444">规则7冲突区</text>
    <text x="60" y="185" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">每个点 = 一种 (A,B,C) 分配方案</text>
  </g>

  <g transform="translate(530,620)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="36" rx="18" fill="#22c55e"/>
    <text x="70" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">有解</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(760,620)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="140" height="36" rx="18" fill="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="70" y="23" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">无解</text>
  </g>

  <text x="600" y="675" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">CSP = 约束满足问题：在有限搜索空间中寻找满足所有约束的变量组合</text>
</svg>

<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: [System.IO.File]::WriteAllText('d:\03.code4cursor\jmixconfigengine\persum\assets\chapter3\03-03-relaxation-mechanism.svg', @'
<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 720" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="Segoe UI, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif">
  <title>3.3 松弛变量：给每条规则装一个开关</title>
  <desc>给每条规则添加二进制开关ri，当ri=1时规则被暂时绕过；求解器最小化sum(ri)</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg3" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#f8fafc"/><stop offset="100%" stop-color="#e2e8f0"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow3" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="130%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="3" stdDeviation="6" flood-color="#64748b" flood-opacity="0.15"/>
    </filter>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="720" fill="url(#bg3)"/>

  <text x="600" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" letter-spacing="1">3.3 松弛变量：给每条规则装一个开关</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="1050" y2="58" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <rect x="80" y="70" width="1040" height="50" rx="10" fill="#eff6ff" stroke="#bfdbfe" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow3)"/>
  <text x="600" y="92" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#1e40af" font-weight="600">核心思想：给每条规则安装一个二进制开关 ri，当 ri=1 时规则被暂时绕过</text>
  <text x="600" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">求解器目标：最小化激活的开关数量（minimize sum of ri）</text>

  <text x="100" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">原始规则</text>
  <text x="320" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">添加松弛变量后</text>
  <text x="530" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">开关</text>
  <line x1="90" y1="155" x2="270" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="300" y1="155" x2="500" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="520" y1="155" x2="640" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>

  <rect x="660" y="130" width="460" height="50" rx="10" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow3)"/>
  <text x="890" y="155" font-size="14" fill="white" font-weight="700" text-anchor="middle">M = 100（大数 Big-M）</text>
  <text x="890" y="172" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8" text-anchor="middle">当 r=1 时，约束几乎失效（虚拟无约束）</text>

  <g transform="translate(80,165)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="6" height="70" rx="3" fill="#3b82f6"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#3b82f6">规则 1</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="14" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B ≥ 8</text>
    <text x="18" y="60" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">下界约束</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(305,165)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">A + B ≥ 8 - M*r1</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="11" fill="#475569">r1=0：保持原约束 ≥8</text>
    <text x="18" y="58" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">r1=1：≥ -92（几乎无下界）</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(530,165)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="110" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="55" y="20" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">r1</text>
    <rect x="25" y="28" width="60" height="24" rx="12" fill="#e2e8f0"/>
    <circle cx="32" cy="40" r="9" fill="#94a3b8"/>
    <text x="55" y="62" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#64748b">关 = 0</text>
  </g>

  <g transform="translate(80,245)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="6" height="70" rx="3" fill="#10b981"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#10b981">规则 2</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="14" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">C ≤ 3</text>
    <text x="18" y="60" font-size="11" fill="#94a3b8">上界约束</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(305,245)" filter="url(#shadow3)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="220" height="70" rx="10" fill="white" stroke="#10b981" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="18" y="20" font-size="12" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">C ≤ 3 + M*r2</text>
    <text x="18" y="42" font-size="11" fill="#475569">r2=0：保持原约束 ≤3</text>
    <text x="18" y="58" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">r2=1：≤ 103（几乎无上界）</text>
  </g>

<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 720" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="Segoe UI, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif">
  <title>3.3 松弛变量：给每条规则装一个开关</title>
  <desc>给每条规则添加二进制开关ri，当ri=1时规则被暂时绕过；求解器最小化sum(ri)</desc>
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="bg3" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="1">

  <text x="600" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#0f172a" letter-spacing="1">3.3 松弛变量：给每条规则装一个开关</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="1050" y2="58" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <text x="600" y="92" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#1e40af" font-weight="600">核心思想：给每条规则安装一个二进制开关 ri，当 ri=1 时规则被暂时绕过</text>
  <text x="600" y="110" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">求解器目标：最小化激活的开关数量（minimize sum of ri）</text>

  <text x="100" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">原始规则</text>
  <text x="320" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">添加松弛变量后</text>
  <text x="530" y="148" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">开关</text>
  <line x1="90" y1="155" x2="270" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="300" y1="155" x2="500" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>
  <line x1="520" y1="155" x2="640" y2="155" stroke="#cbd5e1" stroke-width="1"/>

  <g transform="translate(80,165)" filter="url(#shadow3)">

<svg viewBox="0 0 1200 680" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="Segoe UI, PingFang SC, Microsoft YaHei, sans-serif">
  <title>3.4 松弛之后：求解器看到了什么</title>
  <desc>CP-SAT 求解器输入：变量、约束、目标函数（添加松弛变量后）</desc>
  <defs>

    </linearGradient>
    <filter id="shadow4" x="-10%" y="-10%" width="120%" height="130%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="4" stdDeviation="8" flood-color="#000" flood-opacity="0.3"/>
    </filter>
    <pattern id="grid4" width="20" height="20" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <path d="M 20 0 L 0 0 0 20" fill="none" stroke="#1e293b" stroke-width="0.5"/>
    </pattern>
  </defs>
  <rect width="1200" height="680" fill="url(#bg4)"/>
  <rect width="1200" height="680" fill="url(#grid4)" opacity="0.5"/>

  <text x="600" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="700" fill="#f1f5f9" letter-spacing="1">3.4 松弛之后：求解器看到了什么</text>
  <line x1="150" y1="58" x2="1050" y2="58" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <rect x="480" y="66" width="240" height="28" rx="14" fill="#3b82f6"/>
  <text x="600" y="85" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" fill="white">CP-SAT 求解器输入</text>

  <g transform="translate(60,110)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="360" height="460" rx="14" fill="#1e293b" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow4)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="360" height="44" rx="14" fill="#334155"/>
    <rect x="0" y="14" width="360" height="30" fill="#334155"/>
    <text x="180" y="28" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#f1f5f9">变量</text>

    <rect x="20" y="60" width="320" height="52" rx="8" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#fcd34d" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="40" y="82" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">A</text>
    <text x="100" y="82" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#78350f">= 6</text>
    <text x="40" y="102" font-size="11" fill="#b45309">用户输入（固定）</text>

    <rect x="20" y="122" width="320" height="52" rx="8" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="40" y="144" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#93c5fd">B</text>
    <text x="100" y="144" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#60a5fa">[ 0 , 5 ]</text>
    <text x="40" y="164" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">整数变量</text>

    <rect x="20" y="184" width="320" height="52" rx="8" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#3b82f6" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="40" y="206" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#93c5fd">C</text>
    <text x="100" y="206" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#60a5fa">[ 0 , 5 ]</text>
    <text x="40" y="226" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">整数变量</text>

    <line x1="20" y1="250" x2="340" y2="250" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
    <text x="180" y="265" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">松弛开关（均为二进制）</text>

    <g transform="translate(20,275)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="150" height="38" rx="8" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#334155"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#94a3b8">r1</text>
      <rect x="90" y="10" width="45" height="18" rx="9" fill="#334155"/>
      <circle cx="96" cy="19" r="6" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text x="142" y="24" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">=0</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(170,275)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="150" height="38" rx="8" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#334155"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#94a3b8">r2</text>
      <rect x="90" y="10" width="45" height="18" rx="9" fill="#334155"/>
      <circle cx="96" cy="19" r="6" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text x="142" y="24" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">=0</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(20,323)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="150" height="38" rx="8" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#334155"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#94a3b8">r3</text>
      <rect x="90" y="10" width="45" height="18" rx="9" fill="#334155"/>
      <circle cx="96" cy="19" r="6" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text x="142" y="24" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">=0</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(170,323)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="150" height="38" rx="8" fill="#450a0a" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="2"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#fca5a5">r4</text>
      <rect x="90" y="10" width="45" height="18" rx="9" fill="#ef4444"/>
      <circle cx="129" cy="19" r="6" fill="white"/>
      <text x="142" y="24" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444" font-weight="700">=1</text>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(20,371)">
      <rect x="0" y="0" width="150" height="38" rx="8" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#334155"/>
      <text x="15" y="24" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#94a3b8">r5</text>
      <rect x="90" y="10" width="45" height="18" rx="9" fill="#334155"/>
      <circle cx="96" cy="19" r="6" fill="#64748b"/>
      <text x="142" y="24" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">=0</text>
    </g>
    <rect x="20" y="420" width="320" height="28" rx="6" fill="#1e3a5f" stroke="#334155"/>
    <text x="180" y="438" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">sum = r1+r2+r3+r4+r5 = 0+0+0+1+0 = </text>
    <text x="320" y="438" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#fbbf24">1</text>
  </g>

  <g transform="translate(440,110)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="360" height="460" rx="14" fill="#1e293b" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow4)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="360" height="44" rx="14" fill="#334155"/>
    <rect x="0" y="14" width="360" height="30" fill="#334155"/>
    <text x="180" y="28" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#f1f5f9">约束</text>

    <text x="20" y="70" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">代入 A=6 后的约束：</text>

    <text x="20" y="100" font-size="12" fill="#60a5fa">C1：  6 + B ≥ 8 - 100*r1</text>
    <text x="20" y="118" font-size="11" fill="#475569">→ B ≥ 2 - 100*r1</text>

    <text x="20" y="150" font-size="12" fill="#60a5fa">C2：  C ≤ 3 + 100*r2</text>

    <text x="20" y="200" font-size="12" fill="#fca5a5">C3：  6 + B + C ≤ 8 + 100*r4</text>
    <text x="20" y="218" font-size="11" fill="#fca5a5">→ B + C ≤ 2 + 100*r4</text>
    <rect x="240" y="185" width="100" height="28" rx="6" fill="#450a0a" stroke="#ef4444"/>
    <text x="290" y="204" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444" font-weight="700">r4=1 时</text>
    <text x="290" y="220" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444">B+C ≤ 102</text>

    <text x="20" y="265" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">C4：  (B &gt; 3 → 6 ≤ 4) + 松弛</text>
    <text x="20" y="283" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">→ 当 A=6 时，B ≤ 3</text>

    <text x="20" y="325" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">C5：  (6 &gt; 4 → C ≥ 2) + 松弛</text>
    <text x="20" y="343" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">→ C ≥ 2（A=6 触发）</text>

    <line x1="0" y1="360" x2="360" y2="360" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1" stroke-dasharray="4,3"/>
    <text x="20" y="380" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">第一步：尝试所有 ri = 0</text>
    <text x="20" y="396" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444">→ B+C ≤ 2  但  B ≥ 2, C ≥ 2</text>
    <text x="20" y="412" font-size="11" fill="#ef4444">→ B+C ≥ 4  → 不可行！</text>
    <text x="20" y="432" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">第二步：设 r4=1，其余=0</text>
    <text x="20" y="448" font-size="11" fill="#22c55e">→ B+C ≤ 102  → 满足！</text>
  </g>

  <g transform="translate(820,110)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="200" rx="14" fill="#1e293b" stroke="#334155" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow4)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="44" rx="14" fill="#334155"/>
    <rect x="0" y="14" width="320" height="30" fill="#334155"/>
    <text x="160" y="28" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#fbbf24">目标函数</text>

    <text x="160" y="80" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" fill="white" font-weight="700">minimize</text>
    <text x="160" y="115" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" fill="#fbbf24" font-weight="700">( r1 + r2 + r3 + r4 + r5 )</text>
    <text x="160" y="145" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#94a3b8">含权重：</text>
    <text x="160" y="168" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="#f1f5f9">minimize  (1*r1 + 1*r2 + 1*r3 + 1*r4 + 1*r5)</text>
    <text x="160" y="190" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">所有权重 = 1（同等优先级）</text>
  </g>

  <g transform="translate(820,325)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="245" rx="14" fill="#052e16" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="2" filter="url(#shadow4)"/>
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="320" height="40" rx="14" fill="#14532d"/>
    <rect x="0" y="14" width="320" height="26" fill="#14532d"/>
    <text x="160" y="30" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#86efac">找到解</text>

    <text x="20" y="70" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">部分解：</text>
    <text x="20" y="98" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#fbbf24">A = 6</text>
    <text x="120" y="98" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#fbbf24">B = 2</text>
    <text x="220" y="98" font-size="18" font-weight="700" fill="#fbbf24">C = 2</text>

    <line x1="20" y1="112" x2="300" y2="112" stroke="#14532d" stroke-width="1"/>

    <text x="20" y="135" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">验证：</text>
    <text x="20" y="158" font-size="12" fill="#22c55e">规则1：  6+2 = 8 ≥ 8  [满足]</text>
    <text x="20" y="178" font-size="12" fill="#22c55e">规则2：  2 ≤ 3  [满足]</text>
    <text x="20" y="198" font-size="12" fill="#22c55e">规则3：  A&gt;4 → C≥2  [满足]</text>
    <text x="20" y="218" font-size="12" fill="#ef4444">规则4：  6+2+2 = 10 &gt; 8  [违反]</text>
    <text x="20" y="238" font-size="12" fill="#22c55e">规则5：  B≤3  [满足]</text>
  </g>

  <text x="600" y="665" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#475569">求解器最小化 sum(ri) → 只放松 r4=1，找到部分可行解 A=6, B=2, C=2</text>
</svg>
'@, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)
Write-Output "03-04 zh done"</summary>

  </g>

  <text x="600" y="665" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#475569">求解器最小化 sum(ri) → 只放松 r4=1，找到部分可行解 A=6, B=2, C=2</text>
</svg>
'@, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)

    <text x="35" y="105" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="#dc2626">规则4：A+B+C ≤ 8</text>

    <text x="35" y="187" font-size="13" fill="#92400e">上限提高：8 → 10</text>
    <text x="35" y="200" font-size="11" fill="#b45309">规则4仍被约束，只是界限放宽</text>

    <text x="20" y="230" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#334155">部分解：</text>
    <rect x="20" y="240" width="220" height="60" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4" stroke="#bbf7d0" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="35" y="258" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">A = 6（用户输入）</text>
    <text x="35" y="274" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">B = 2（规则1推导）</text>
    <text x="35" y="290" font-size="12" fill="#15803d">C = 2（规则3推导）</text>
  </g>

  <rect x="50" y="460" width="1100" height="90" rx="14" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow5)"/>
  <text x="600" y="490" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">用户决策：接下来怎么办？</text>

  <g transform="translate(130,505)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="36" rx="10" fill="#14532d" stroke="#16a34a" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="200" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="#86efac">方案A：接受松弛后的配置</text>
    <text x="200" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">"我知道规则4被放宽了，放心使用这个配置"</text>
  </g>
  <g transform="translate(570,505)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="400" height="36" rx="10" fill="#450a0a" stroke="#ef4444" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="200" y="24" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="600" fill="#fca5a5">方案B：调整输入以满足规则4</text>
    <text x="200" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">"把 A 降到 4 或 5，严格遵守规则4"</text>
  </g>

  <text x="600" y="580" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#334155" font-weight="600">核心价值："无解/有解"的二值问题 → 有价值的用户决策参考</text>
  <text x="600" y="600" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#64748b">"哪些规则被绕过 + 部分可行解" 给用户提供可操作的决策依据</text>

</svg>
'@, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)

      <line x1="10" y1="54" x2="50" y2="54" stroke="#93c5fd" stroke-width="2"/>
    </g>
    <text x="65" y="130" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">冲突报告</text>
    <text x="65" y="148" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#64748b">+ 部分解</text>
    <rect x="10" y="158" width="110" height="60" rx="8" fill="#fef3c7" stroke="#fcd34d"/>
    <text x="65" y="178" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="700" fill="#92400e">规则4被松弛</text>
    <text x="65" y="196" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#b45309">A=6, B=2, C=2</text>
    <text x="65" y="212" text-anchor="middle" font-size="10" fill="#92400e">上限：8 → 10</text>
  </g>

  <rect x="50" y="330" width="1100" height="80" rx="14" fill="#1e3a5f" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
  <text x="600" y="358" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="700" fill="white">完整工作流</text>
  <text x="600" y="382" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="#fbbf24" font-weight="600">业务规则 → 数学模型 → 无解 → 添加开关 → 最小化 sum(ri) → 可操作的诊断</text>
  <text x="600" y="402" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">将"有解/无解"的二值问题转化为"哪些规则冲突 + 部分可行解"</text>

  <rect x="50" y="430" width="530" height="180" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
  <rect x="50" y="430" width="530" height="40" rx="14" fill="#3b82f6"/>
  <rect x="50" y="454" width="530" height="16" fill="#3b82f6"/>
  <text x="315" y="456" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">为什么松弛变量有效</text>

  <text x="80" y="495" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#3b82f6">传统方式：</text>
  <rect x="80" y="505" width="470" height="36" rx="8" fill="#fef2f2"/>
  <text x="100" y="526" font-size="12" fill="#dc2626">"无解" → 用户困惑，需要人工排查</text>

  <text x="80" y="562" font-size="12" font-weight="700" fill="#10b981">松弛变量方式：</text>
  <rect x="80" y="572" width="470" height="36" rx="8" fill="#f0fdf4"/>
  <text x="100" y="593" font-size="12" fill="#16a34a">"规则4被松弛，部分解 A=6,B=2,C=2" → 用户可决策</text>

  <rect x="600" y="430" width="550" height="180" rx="14" fill="white" stroke="#e2e8f0" stroke-width="1.5" filter="url(#shadow6)"/>
  <rect x="600" y="430" width="550" height="40" rx="14" fill="#059669"/>
  <rect x="600" y="454" width="550" height="16" fill="#059669"/>
  <text x="875" y="456" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="700" fill="white">核心公式</text>

  <g font-size="12" fill="#334155">
    <text x="625" y="490" font-weight="700" fill="#3b82f6">步骤1（建模）：</text>
    <text x="625" y="508">业务规则 → A+B+C ≤ 8, A+B ≥ 8, ...</text>
    <text x="625" y="530" font-weight="700" fill="#8b5cf6">步骤3（松弛）：</text>
    <text x="625" y="548">添加 ri：A+B+C ≤ 8 + M*r4</text>
    <text x="625" y="570" font-weight="700" fill="#f59e0b">步骤4（目标）：</text>
    <text x="625" y="588">minimize sum(wi * ri)</text>
    <text x="625" y="610" font-weight="700" fill="#10b981">步骤5（诊断）：</text>
    <text x="625" y="628">读取 ri = 1 → 冲突规则</text>
  </g>

  <text x="600" y="625" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#94a3b8">最小化 sum(ri) 找到最少规则集合松弛，最大程度保留原始业务逻辑</text>
</svg>
'@, [System.Text.Encoding]::UTF8)

public void addControlParaEqual(String sumParaCode, String instSumParaCode) {
    ParaVarImpl sumParaVar = this.getParaVar(sumParaCode);
    if (sumParaVar == null) {
        log.error("ParaVarImpl not found for code: {}", sumParaCode);
        throw new AlgLoaderException("ParaVarImpl not found for code: " + sumParaCode);
    }
    String[] parts = instSumParaCode.split(":");
    if (parts.length != 2) {
        log.error("instSumParaCode is invalid: {}", instSumParaCode);
        throw new AlgLoaderException("instSumParaCode is invalid: " + instSumParaCode);
    }

    String partCategoryCodePrefix = parts[0].trim();

根据代码分析，我已经对 `Sum_Quantity` 的流向有了完整的理解。让我把关键点列出来：

---

## 问题分析

### `Sum_Quantity` / `Sum_Capacity` 在代码中的流向图

```
DSL: "disk:Sum_Quantity ==0 where PortRate=10G"
              │
              ▼
ModuleScenarioTestBase.parseConstraintReq()  [拆解出 Sum 和 Quantity]
              │
              ▼
attrCode = "Quantity"      (注意：没有 Sum_ 前缀！)
attrType = AttrParaType.Sum
              │
              ▼
CrossCategoryTotalConstraintBuilder.build()
  │
  ├─→ PartAlgCPLinearExpr 名称 = "aggregate_disk_expr" 
  │        └─→ buildSumExprInternal(attrCode="Quantity", varName="Q")
  │              └─→ 遍历 PartVar，获取 qty 变量 (##Part.disk.d1.Q)
  │                  系数 = 1 (因为 attrCode="Quantity" 特殊处理)
  │
  └─→ operator.applyConstraint(model, expr, 0)
              │
              ▼
    CP-SAT 约束表达式：d1.Q == 0
```

### 关键发现

1. **`Sum_Quantity` 从不作为 OR-Tools IntVar 的名称出现**。它只作为：
   - DSL 测试字符串中的语法（如 `"disk:Sum_Quantity ==0"`）
   - `Para.code` 的字段值（domain model 层的内部标识符）
   - `paraMap` 的 key（用于内存中查找对应的 ParaVarImpl）

2. **实际传入 CP-SAT 的是 PartVar.qty 变量**，名称格式为 `##Part.{category}.{partCode}.Q`

3. **`Para.code = "Sum_Quantity"` 在 `paraMap` 中存在**，但 INPUT 类型的 `ParaVarImpl` 不为其 `value` 字段创建 OR-Tools `IntVar`（因为值直接通过 `inputValue` 设置）

4. **`SolutionUtils.printOthers()` 打印的是 `OtherVar`**，其 code 来自 `registerVariables()` 中的变量 name（`OtherVar` 中的 name 不带 `##Para.` 前缀）。所以如果某处确实以 `Sum_Quantity` 作为 OR-Tools 变量名注册，才会出现在输出中。

---

protected ParaVarImpl newAttrParaVar(String paraCode) {
    Para para = new Para();
    para.setCode(paraCode);
    para.setAssignType(AssignType.INPUT);
    para.setParaType(ParaType.INTEGER);
    ParaVarImpl pVar = initParaVar(para);
    paraMap.put(paraCode, pVar);
    return pVar;
}
```

public int initShortCode(int startIndex) {    int index = startIndex;

        if (para.getCode().length() <= 3) {
            para.setShortCode(para.getCode());

```

## 完整分析结果

### 问题根源

`Sum_Quantity` / `Sum_Capacity` 以两种形式存在于系统中：

| 形式 | 说明 |
|------|------|
| **DSL 语法** | 在约束字符串中，如 `"disk:Sum_Quantity ==0"` |
| **`Para.code`** | 在 `paraMap` 中的 key，和 `ParaVarImpl.base.code` |

当 `Para.code = "Sum_Quantity"` 时，它出现在解输出中的原因是：

### 解输出中的 ParaInst 流程

1. **`ModuleInstSolutionCallBack.toParaInst()`** (`ModuleInstSolutionCallBack.java` 第 154-158 行)：
```java
private ParaInst toParaInst(ParaVarImpl pv) {
    ParaInst pi = new ParaInst();
    pi.setCode(pv.getCode());   // = "Sum_Quantity"
    pi.setShortCode(pv.getBase().getShortCode());  // **这里取 shortCode，可能为 null**
    ...
}
```

2. **`ParaInst.toShortString()`** (`ParaInst.java` 第 55-72 行)：
```java
public String toShortString() {
    sb.append(shortCode != null ? shortCode : code).append("(");
    // 如果 shortCode 为 null，则使用 code（即 "Sum_Quantity"）
    ...
}
```

3. **`Para.shortCode` 为 null 的原因**：

**`Onto.initShortCode()`** (`Onto.java` 第 100-111 行)：
```java
public int initShortCode(int startIndex) {
    int index = startIndex;
    for (Para para : getParas()) {
        if (para.getCode().length() <= 3) {
            para.setShortCode(para.getCode());
        } else {
            para.setShortCode(Para.SHORT_CODE_PREFIX + index);  // "P" + index
            index++;
        }
    }
}
```

**问题在于**：通过 `ModuleBaseAlgImpl.newAttrParaVar(String paraCode)` 创建的 `Para` 对象：
```386:400:src/main/java/com/jmix/executor/impl/algmodel/ModuleBaseAlgImpl.java
    protected ParaVarImpl newAttrParaVar(String paraCode) {
        Para para = new Para();
        para.setCode(paraCode);      // "Sum_Quantity"
        para.setAssignType(AssignType.INPUT);
        para.setParaType(ParaType.INTEGER);
        // 注意：这里创建的 Para 从未添加到 module.getParas() 列表中！
        ParaVarImpl pVar = initParaVar(para);
        paraMap.put(paraCode, pVar); // 仅放入 paraMap，不加入 module 的 Para 列表
        return pVar;
    }
```

**`initShortCode()` 只遍历 `module.getParas()`**，而动态创建的 `Para`（如 `Sum_Quantity`）从未被加入 module 的 `paras` 列表，所以它的 `shortCode` 始终为 null。最终在解输出中显示为 `Sum_Quantity(...)` 而非 `P12(...)`。

2. `paraMap.get("Sum_Quantity")` returns this ParaVar
3. `setPartCategoryInputVariales()` sets `inputValue` on this ParaVar

5. The actual constraint comes from `buildSumExprInternal()`, which accesses `PartVar.qty` (an actual IntVar) and builds a linear expression from it rather than using the INPUT ParaVar at all

So the INPUT ParaVar "Sum_Quantity" doesn't actually create OR-Tools variables—it's just a data container for `inputValue`. The constraint gets built directly from PartVar.qty. But there's something still unclear about how these pieces fit together. I see the issue now—when `attrCode = "Quantity"` and the special case triggers, `attrValue` gets set to 1, which means the constraint becomes `1 * d1.Q == 0` instead of `d1.Q == 0`. This works functionally, but it's redundant since multiplying by 1 doesn't change the equation.

The real insight is that the `Sum_Quantity` ParaVar only serves as a data container to hold the constraint value in memory—it's never actually used to create OR-Tools variables. The actual constraint is built directly from PartVar.qty variables, so the concern about unnecessary variables inflating the feasible space is resolved: this ParaVar doesn't add any computational overhead.

For the output side, there's a design choice to make about whether INPUT-type Paras should appear in the solution output at all. They're not solver variables, just data containers, so Option B seems cleaner—excluding them from output since they don't represent actual solver state. Option A would be to give them short codes for display purposes, but that feels less optimal if we're trying to keep the output focused on what's actually being solved. a normal Para (like user-defined Paras), but that would require adding them to the module's paras list. The `paraMap` includes all Paras from the module, not just the shortCode-able ones. When building the solution output, `ModuleInstSolutionCallBack` creates `ParaInst` objects for every `ParaVarImpl` in `paraMap`, which means `Sum_Quantity` gets added even though it lacks a shortCode. The real problem is that INPUT-type Paras shouldn't be included in the solution output at all—they're not solver variables but rather intermediate computational values, so they need to be filtered out in the `buildModuleBaseInst` method. So the INPUT ParaVar for Sum_Quantity is just a data container storing the user input value, and it doesn't create any OR-Tools variables. The actual constraint is built from PartVar.qty variables, so the feasible space isn't inflated by having this ParaVar. 您提出了两个非常好的架构问题。让我直接回答：

### 问题 1：`Sum_Quantity` 有没有必要初始化为约束变量？

**实际上，它并没有被初始化为约束变量。**

回顾代码流程：

- `newAttrParaVar()` 创建的 `Para`（code=`"Sum_Quantity"`）是 `AssignType.INPUT` 类型
- 在 `initParaVar()` 中，`INPUT` 类型直接 `return paraVar`，**不会调用 `newIntVar()`**
- 因此 **`Sum_Quantity` 不会创建任何 OR-Tools IntVar，不会增大可行解空间**
- 它只是一个**内存数据容器**，存储用户输入的约束值（如 `==0` 中的 `0`）

实际的 CP-SAT 约束来自 `buildSumExprInternal()` 直接对 `PartVar.qty` 变量构建表达式。所以您的担心是正确的方向，但好消息是当前实现中它**没有实际增加求解器变量**。

### 问题 2：每个 Solution 中是否应该打印它？

这确实是一个合理的输出整洁性问题。当前 `paraMap` 中所有 `ParaVarImpl`（包括 `Sum_Quantity` 这种 INPUT 类型）都会通过 `toParaInst()` 转换成 `ParaInst` 加入解输出。但它**不是求解器变量**，只是存储输入值的中间数据。

建议的修改方向是：**在解输出时过滤掉 INPUT 类型的 ParaInst**。

for (ParaVarImpl pv : moduleAlg.getParaVars()) {
